news.Title: SanDisk (SNDK) Leads Tech Losers With Double-Digit Decline
news.Content:
SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) is one of the 10 Stocks Investors Are Running Away From.

SanDisk snapped a three-day winning streak on Tuesday, slashing 12.63 percent of its value to close at $1,673.97 apiece, after a heavy selloff in the wider market, thanks to the re-escalating tensions between the US and Iran.

Investors appeared to have cashed in on gains in high-growth industries, such as semiconductors, while parking funds to mitigate risks, after President Donald Trump recently announced the reinstatement of what he called an "Iranian blockade" in the Strait of Hormuz.

Photo from Sandisk's website

The announcement heavily dampened investor sentiment despite Trump's clarification that cargoes from other countries will be able to pass through the Straight freely and safely. Wall Street's three major indices all finished in the red, led by the Nasdaq, down 1.55 percent, followed by the S&P 500, losing 0.79 percent, and the Dow Jones, shedding 0.26 percent.

For SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK), the selloff was primarily triggered by profit-taking, having already soared by 5,442 percent in just the past 52 weeks, and even with Monday's selloff, the stock remained up by 605.19 percent year-to-date.

In other news, SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) is set to announce the results of its earnings performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2026 after market close on August 5, 2026. A conference call will be held to elaborate on the results.

For the period, SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ:SNDK) is targeting to report revenues between $7.75 billion and $8.25 billion, or an implied growth of 308 percent to 334 percent from the $1.9 billion posted in the same period last year.

news.Title: 台股盤中狂瀉1700點！所幸尾盤回血　台積電收2420元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

美國總統川普宣布恢復對伊朗封鎖行動，並對通過荷姆茲海峽的貨物徵收20％費用，導致中東緊張情勢升溫，國際油價創下一個月來新高。亞洲股市週二（14日）也在局勢影響下持續動盪，台股今開盤後便一路走低，盤中狂瀉逾1,700點、最低來到43,654.04點；所幸尾盤回血，終場指數收在44,737.95點、下跌642.57點，跌幅1.42％，成交量1兆1,786.17億元。台積電（2330）終場下跌20元、收在2,420元。

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）收在235.5元，下跌1元；聯發科（2454）收3,660元，跌165元；廣達（2382）收380元，漲2元；台達電（2308）以1,855元作收，跌35元；日月光投控（3711）跌29元，收641元；聯電（2303）下跌2.5元，收151元；大立光（3008）收在4,265元，下跌80元。

金融方面，富邦金（2881）收在125元，跌2元；國泰金（2882）下滑0.6元，收在96.1元；中信金（2891）以65元作收，下跌1.5元；兆豐金（2886）收在47元平盤價；華南金（2880）漲0.25元，收39.25元；第一金（2892）收33.55元，下跌0.1元；合庫金（5880）以25.2元平盤價作收。

今日成交量前10名個股依序為群創、友達、力積電、南亞、台塑、漢翔、華邦電、南亞科、台化、台新新光金。此外，漲幅前五名為迅杰、統懋、和成、銘旺科、昶和；至於跌幅前五名則為百容、禾伸堂、志聖、世芯-KY、采鈺。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Content:

news.Title: 台股暴跌1726點後拉回收跌642點 台積電跌20元
news.Content:
美伊局勢升溫美股收跌，台股今（14）日連帶受到拖累開低，一度暴跌1726.48點摔至43654.04點，中午過後拉回到44K防線，終場下跌642.57點收44737.95點，跌幅1.42%，成交量1兆1786.17億元。

台積電 （2330）跌20元收在2420元，聯發科（2454）一度跌逾300元，最終回彈仍收跌165元到3660元，台達電（2308）跌35元收在1855元。

被動元件慘綠，國巨*（2327）跌半根收在778元，華新科（2492）也跌近7%到390元，禾伸堂（3026）則是亮燈鎖在跌停價815元；因應國際戰局惡化，油電、塑膠概念股逆勢走高，台塑（1301）、南亞（1303）、台塑化（6505）漲幅在5%上下。

責任編輯／洪季謙

news.Title: 台股急跌後留長下影線，台塑集團及台積電將是指標
news.Content:
【財訊快報／方亞申】美國總統川普宣布，恢復針對荷姆茲海峽封鎖行動，美伊緊張局勢再度升溫，國際油價聞訊飆漲近10%，加上SK海力士ADR領跌半導體族群，美股週一四大指數全面下跌。台股週二開低走低，一度下跌超過1500點，算是接續週一日韓大跌後的補跌，所幸中場過後日韓股市拉升，台股部分族台塑集團股、軍工股、矽晶圓股等等，大盤拉出長下影線，終場指數下跌642.57點，收在44737.95點，成交量11786.17億元。短線43500點以下支撐不弱，季線支撐更強，等待日KD值交叉向上較妥當。韓股週一因為海力士及三星在其國內外倍數槓桿ETF大跌，兩者股價雙雙重挫，導致第七度股市熔斷，進而影響日本鎧俠重挫以及晚間美股海力士ADR、美光等記憶體走勢大跌。賺得盆滿缽滿的記憶體大廠三星上週公佈獲利，竟然可超越輝達；再來7月10日海力士在美國掛牌，都是利多消息，但是若以週一來看，三星跌破財報公布當日30萬韓元價格；海力士在海外掛牌後，週一母股也出現重跌，進而影響在美掛牌海力士股價，似乎利多都不捧場，且連串下跌，引發韓國政府關切要整頓。

另外，6月份掛牌的SpaceX股價上衝超過200美元後就下跌，週一僅剩139.14美元，距離掛牌定價135美元已不遠。而不管SpaceX或是海力士ADR，從美國市場吸金超過1100億美元，這點顯示，今年漲多的電子股要小心。再者，科技七雄發債頻繁，輝達、臉書、亞馬遜，市場原本搶購意願強，但近期逐漸降低溫度，就是對AI是否終端能夠產生獲利保持懷疑，接下來OpenAI或Anthropic還要掛牌，市場是否趨於保守，值得觀察。

台股週一小漲25點，但是被動元件、功率半導體、記憶體等都下跌，僅ABF四檔上漲，還有部分矽晶圓、塑化及軍工股也強勢。週二能夠續強的南亞科(2408)、南亞(1303)、台塑(1301)、台塑化(6505)、台化(1326)、台達化(1309)、漢翔(2634)、雷虎(8033)、台虹(8039)、大聯大(3702)、大量(3167)，塑化股較強是因為石油大漲至79美元(西德州)，其他幾乎都是漲價利多但股價走低，看來籌碼問題較嚴重，尤其融資週一只有減少12億元左右，週二若能出現大減留下影線，在短線急跌超過2成以上的熱門被動元件、功率半導體、記憶體等族群就有利較強勢反彈。當然台積電(2330)將開法說會，以該公司6月、第二季強勁業績，股價低檔應有強大支撐；聯電(2303)，世界(5347)、力積電(6770)低檔有接手。台塑四寶以及金控雙雄富邦金(2881)及國泰金(2882)也是指標。

短線上，指數在季線至43100點有一定支撐；漲價股急跌清理籌碼後則有利再反彈。

news.Title: 台股重挫1700點之後反彈！終場下殺642點 2大族群逆勢漲
news.Content:
台股今（14日）又出現劇烈下殺，盤中一度暴跌超過1700點，尾盤跌幅大幅收斂，最終仍下跌642.57點，收在44737.95點，痛失45K大關。權值股全面失守，台積電跌20元收在2420元，台達電挫低35元收在1835元，聯發科也下跌165元收在3660元。

熱門族群同樣面臨沉重賣壓，被動元件疲弱，國巨一度逼近跌停，最終下跌38元（或4.66%）收在778元，禾伸堂慘摔超過9%，日電貿鎖在跌停價232.5元，華新科與凱美也都跌逾7%。記憶體一片綠油油僅南亞科逆勢大漲超過5%，PCB則以南電收紅最為強勢。

盤面上以塑膠與油電燃氣族群最為強勢，台塑四寶強勢上漲，台塑大漲超過4%，南亞也上漲將近5%，台塑化同步上漲超過5%，台化漲逾3%。

台股盤中接連失守45000點與44000點大關，後市恐難避免進一步震盪，尤其韓國股市持續去槓桿，今又一度下跌超過5%，且地緣政治風險再度升高，美伊衝突使油價大漲，聯準會理事放鷹，警告若核心通膨無法穩住，就會出現升息可能性。

3大利空使台股遭遇空襲，摩爾投顧分析師林漢偉於個人Youtube頻道上表示，若從籌碼面來看，外資在現貨持續賣超，期貨空單也小幅增加，整體仍呈現偏空基調，櫃買指數也面臨關鍵的季線保衛戰，建議投資人「先看少做、多看少動」，控制好手上部位的風險，聚焦在有營收與避險族群。

news.Title: China smartphone shipments fall for fifth straight quarter as costs rise - IDC
news.Content:
By Che Pan and Eduardo Baptista

BEIJING, July 14 (Reuters) - China's smartphone shipments fell 4.3% to 66 million ‌units in the second quarter from a year ‌earlier, as many manufacturers hiked prices to reflect rising memory and ​component costs, research firm IDC said on Tuesday.

It was the fifth straight quarterly decline, and first-half shipments were down 4.2% from a year earlier.

More from Yahoo Scout

Why did China's smartphone shipments decline in Q2?

How did Huawei and Apple achieve growth?

Which manufacturers saw the biggest market share losses?

What impact did component costs have on pricing?

Huawei Technologies and Apple were ‌the only vendors ⁠to post growth in the quarter, with shipments up 19.4% and 24.4%, respectively.

"Huawei and Apple ⁠held their prices steady while competitors were raising theirs, and that gave hesitant buyers a reason to go ​ahead and ​purchase in a quarter ​when most of the ‌market was giving them a reason to wait," said Arthur Guo, a senior analyst at IDC China.

Huawei ranked first with a 22.6% market share, while Apple came second with an 18.1% share. Xiaomi , which ranked fifth, saw ‌its second-quarter shipments down 21.7%, ​with Oppo and Vivo seeing ​shipments fall 9.7% and ​11.4%, respectively.

Most Android vendors raised prices or ‌cut back on budget models ​in response ​to surging memory chips and other component costs, discouraging consumers from upgrading. The fading effect of government ​subsidies also removed ‌a prop that had supported demand in earlier ​quarters, IDC said.

(Reporting by Che Pan and Eduardo ​Baptista; Editing by Kevin Buckland)

news.Title: 29 Wall Street Analysts Priced SpaceX. Here Is the Target Worth Paying Attention To
news.Content:
Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) recently went public in what may have been the most anticipated IPO ever. It didn't disappoint. The stock performed well on its debut and in the subsequent days, even rising to the fifth-largest company on the market at some point. A slew of analysts have weighed in on the stock. There are currently at least 29 firms covering the company, and the overwhelming majority have highly positive opinions and average price targets that imply healthy upside from current levels. Perhaps the most surprising price target of them all came from Brian Gesuale, an analyst at Raymond James (NYSE: RJF). Here's just how bullish Gesuale is on SpaceX's prospects.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Everything would have to go right

SpaceX is looking to tap into transformational opportunities. Within its space segment, the company has already made breakthroughs with its pioneering partially reusable rockets, which have significantly decreased the cost of space travel. This success has helped fuel some of the company's other businesses. For instance, the company's Starlink, which offers internet connectivity through a constellation of Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites, is by far the leader in this niche, with more satellites in orbit than any of its competitors -- a feat it achieved largely through innovations in space travel.

SpaceX is now looking to go even further, literally and figuratively. The company's next-gen rocket, Starship, is fully reusable, unlike its current flagship rocket, Falcon 9, which is only partially reusable. Starship can also carry much larger and heavier payloads. SpaceX is counting on Starship to reach Mars, significantly increase the number of satellites in orbit -- thereby improving its Starlink business -- and eventually build data centers in space. Substantially lower space-travel costs could also make space tourism profitable. If the company can realize this vision, or something close to it, the stock could indeed deliver life-changing returns, and maybe that's exactly what Gesuale thinks will happen.

That may explain the $800 price target the analyst set for the stock, which represents an upside of almost 482% from current levels.This is an aggressive price target, even by Wall Street's standards, which has been extremely bullish on SpaceX since the company went public.

Story Continues

Should you buy SpaceX stock?

SpaceX is a highly innovative company that leads its space and Starlink segments and arguably benefits from a moat, as its vertical integration has helped it drastically reduce expenses. Given the opportunities ahead, it makes sense to keep the company on your watch list. However, there are significant risks with the company, one of which is that some of SpaceX's success may already be baked into the stock price. The company isn't worth about $2 trillion because of its financial results. In terms of revenue, earnings, and free cash flow, SpaceX pales in comparison to similarly sized corporations.

That means the stock may fall sharply at the first sign of trouble. Further, many of SpaceX's ambitions depend on its Starship rocket, which is still in test flight. The company needs these tests to go well. So far, they have. But if Starship encounters any trouble, many of SpaceX's plans will be in question. Meanwhile, Starlink is SpaceX's most important business, accounting for all of its operating profit in the fiscal year 2025. However, Starlink's average revenue per user has been declining over the past few years.

As competition intensifies , the company could see slowing growth in this business, which might become a major problem. Lastly, SpaceX faces significant regulatory risk, given that contracts from the U.S. federal government accounted for about 20% of its revenue last year. This could change with new administrations and impact the company's financial results. For all those reasons (and more), SpaceX is a fairly risky stock. My view is that the $800 price target is far too aggressive, and the company isn't a buy at current levels.

The Netherlands-based business is Europe's most valuable listed company with a market capitalisation of €610 billion ($696 billion) after ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ASML, a key supplier of AI chip manufacturing equipment, is set to report earnings with expectations of an 8.8% rise in net profit to €2.61 billion on 14% revenue growth to €8.8 billion.
• The company's full-year revenue forecast is between €36 billion and €40 billion, with some analysts suggesting it could be conservative, potentially reaching €60 billion by 2030.
• ASML faces challenges from U.S. export controls aimed at curbing China's access to advanced chips, though China is expected to account for up to 20% of sales this year through less advanced tools.
• Despite a high valuation (49x estimated 2027 earnings), some analysts see potential upside, while others maintain a 'hold' rating due to the stock's current pricing.

news.Title: Voyager Technologies Completes Astrobotic Acquisition And Was Just Awarded a $298 Million Contract From NASA

It's closing a major acquisition of a business that is not only highly complementary to its operations, but one that recently secured a nearly $300 million contract from a top government agency. To me, this makes Voyager stock even more compelling, despite a few concerns I have about the company. Read on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Voyager Technologies (VOYG) has acquired Astrobotic Technology for up to $300 million in a cash-and-stock transaction, renaming it Voyager Lunar Systems.
• Astrobotic was awarded a $298 million contract from NASA for two lunar lander missions as part of an initiative to build a permanent lunar base.

news.Title: 台韓股重挫霸菱示警！ 建議「有紀律獲利了結AI勝出股」
news.Content:
韓股這波修正將近三成，台股今早急跌1500點，霸菱亞洲（不含中國）股票團隊主管林素亥（SooHai Lim）今（14日）早發布最新亞股看法，認為「台韓股市漲多需謹慎」，不要盲目追逐指數動能，「市場報酬已不再是全面性的Beta行情，建議有紀律獲利了結AI勝出股」。不過相較於韓股「結構性風險上升」，認為台股雖然評價較高，但波動度相對韓股可能較低。

林素亥認為，亞洲股市仍具建設性機會，但在市場上半年已大幅上漲、且表現主要由台灣與韓國AI供應鏈帶動後，投資操作上需要更趨審慎。未來市場機會仍在，但投資人應將焦點放在選股、獲利品質及風險控管，而非單純追逐指數動能。

展望未來幾個月，若半導體獲利預估持續上修，且油價維持在可控範圍，亞洲股市仍有支撐。不過，林素亥指出，市場報酬已不再是全面性的Beta行情，投資組合建構需更重視高品質獲利兌現、穩健的資產負債表，以及對AI擁擠交易中的勝出者進行有紀律的獲利了結。

儘管今年以來漲幅強勁，林素亥表示，由於記憶體晶片龍頭股價漲幅仍落後於獲利預估上修幅度，MSCI亞洲（不含日本）指數評價仍具吸引力。然而，目前指數集中度已相當高，主要晶圓代工與記憶體個股合計占比顯著，科技類股比重亦接近指數的一半。在AI吸引市場焦點與資金流向之際，AI供應鏈以外的投資機會也逐漸浮現，例如評價已下修的中國網路巨擘開始展現吸引力。

總經環境方面，如市場定價所反映，聯準會今年仍可能轉向升息；不過，隨著中東脆弱的停火局勢使油價拉回至接近戰前水準，升息壓力或可暫時緩解。考量亞洲貨幣今年以來走弱，市場似乎已大致反映此一情境；部分亞洲央行也已提前升息，以捍衛匯率或抑制通膨。林素亥認為，油價仍是後續需密切關注的關鍵變數。

在主要市場方面，韓國在獲利預估上修與評價面仍具基本面吸引力，但由於兩大記憶體龍頭在韓國指數中的占比偏高，加上單一個股槓桿型ETF帶動動能交易參與升溫，市場結構性風險已上升，並可能加劇指數波動。相較之下，台灣則可透過更廣泛的供應鏈參與AI資本支出擴張，雖然評價較高，但波動度相對可能較低。

此外，林素亥也觀察到，科技股獲利所帶來的財富效果，已開始外溢至台灣金融股及韓國非必需消費類股。對科技權重較高的市場而言，美國超大型雲端服務商第三季財報與資本支出指引將是重要催化因素，尤其目前市場仍對AI支出的可持續性抱持疑慮。

香港／中國市場方面，上半年表現不如預期，主要受到消費復甦不均及監管不確定性影響；不過，市場關注度仍高，從IPO市場熱絡，以及具備長期結構性主題的個股持續受到青睞即可看出。整體而言，我們仍維持建設性看法，認為市場中仍存在良好的選股機會。

印度方面，油價下跌有助於改善經常帳並緩解通膨壓力，逆風可望逐步減弱。東協市場中，泰國受惠於政治情勢改善及AI資本支出題材而相對突出；印尼則在政策可信度恢復及11月MSCI檢討結果明朗前，評價已大幅下修，後續仍可留意政策與資金面變化。

葉憶如／財經特派記者組長，主跑金管會、金控壽險、航空等

news.Title: 台股一度狂殺逾1700點！史上第6慘　分析師曝3大止跌訊號
news.Content: 美伊戰火再起，美股持續下修，費城半導體更下跌4.7％，台積電ADR下跌2.8％，使得台股多頭氣虛，今天一路走低，盤中一度重挫1726點，是史上單日盤中第6大跌點，跌落至4萬3654點，失守4萬4千點整數關卡，跌幅約3.8％。 截至發稿為止，台股仍下跌超過1400點。 南韓股市今天未能止跌，繼昨天大跌8.9％後，今天又下殺近4％，也拖累台股走勢。 分析師謝明哲指出，台股殺盤主要就是殺估值過高、 韓股崩盤、台幣貶值跟明天的台指期結算，目前是4月以來，台股落在月線以下時間最久的一次，OTC櫃買指數也已跌破季線，代表中小型股表現很弱勢，因此整體來看，台股還沒有看到明確的止跌訊號，建議先減碼因應。 謝明哲指出，台股是否持續下探，可能看幾個關鍵：1. 台幣能否止貶回升，2. 明日結算後，外資期貨空單是否大幅回補，3.下檔季線（目前約在43133點左右）能否防守，如果守不住，下檔支撐會先看4萬點整數大關。 至於台積電法說會能否扭轉盤勢？謝明哲認為，法說會內容一定是利多，但不確定是利多出盡，還是利多上漲，但因台幣貶值，所以台積電很難大漲。 第一金投信指出，第二季以來台股勁揚頻創新高後，近期指數處高檔區震盪加快、加大，投資人面對下半年台股行情投資策略宜謹慎因應，儘管美、台、韓等科技指數皆出現修正，不過，AI科技產業成長力道強勁，台股回檔、籌碼沈澱後，可望蓄積續揚推升力。 主動第一金優股息ETF(00408A)，即將於明天上市，基金經理人張正中指出，此波台股的表現，持續反應AI帶來的產業轉型，展現台股高獲利成長、高股利成長、高本益比的特性，接著在下半年，進入高波動、類股輪動加快的台股行情，特別進入傳統台股除權息旺季，不少高股息成長標的，在波動行情中，更接棒成為穩盤要角。 張正中對於台股AI供應鏈的後市成長力仍持續看好，觀察台股企業營運動能， Bloomberg資料顯示，2026年預估台股企業營業利益年增率53%，企業獲利年增率49%，且預估2027年仍維持超過兩成以上的成長力道，AI訂單需求、新世代規格汰換升級等，正是支撐股價的關鍵動能。 張正中認為，現階段高通膨、高利率環境對股市評價形成壓力，不過，台股整體報酬多來自企業獲利成長與產業結構調整，歷經波動後指數表現仍將回復獲利動能趨勢，目前AI需求成長與升級趨勢明確，相關供應鏈訂單與獲利動能正向，整體AI投資仍處上升循環，基本面穩健、具競爭優勢的企業長線布局機會佳。 主動凱基台灣(00407A)ETF研究團隊表示，七月台股創高後轉入高檔震盪，但資金並未撤離AI主軸，僅在族群間快速輪動，可視為多頭趨勢中的技術性修正，而非行情轉折訊號；台股基本面仍相當強韌，台灣6月出口748.3億美元，再創歷年單月第3高，年增40.3%，景氣燈號也連6紅，在美國通膨仍具黏性的外在環境下，聯準會年底前利率政策下行空間有限，意味著比起評價擴張，指數上檔空間更仰賴企業獲利上修支撐。

news.Title: Nvidia halves Asia buyer list in China chip crackdown, FT reports
news.Content: July 13 (Reuters) - Nvidia has more than halved the number of Asian customers authorised to buy its AI chips ‌after introducing a "white list" of companies that passed tougher ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia has significantly reduced its list of authorized Asian customers for AI chips by implementing a 'white list' to comply with U.S. export restrictions.
• Over half of previous customers, particularly neo-cloud providers, failed initial compliance checks and were removed from the list.
• This tighter scrutiny aims to prevent advanced U.S. chips, including Nvidia's Blackwell processors, from reaching Chinese entities via third countries like Malaysia.
• Nvidia is enhancing its due diligence, including site visits and contract verification, with oversight from the U.S. Department of Commerce.
news.Keywords: export controls, China, AI chips, compliance, supply chain

news.Title: 美伊衝突再起！川普擬接管荷莫茲海峽　國際油價飆逾9%、台股跌破千點
news.Content:
美伊衝突再升溫，美國總統川普（Donald Trump）宣布恢復對伊朗海上封鎖，並將對行經 荷莫茲海峽 的貨物收取20%費用，引發全球市場震盪。市場擔憂全球能源供應恐再受衝擊，國際油價單日收盤漲逾9%，美股全面收黑，亞股今（14）日也同步承壓，韓國、日本股市開低，台股早盤重挫逾千點。

川普重啟荷莫茲海峽封鎖 徵收20%過路費

近日美伊局勢再度急遽惡化。起因於伊朗軍方近期攻擊航經荷莫茲海峽的商船，美國則重啟對伊朗的軍事打擊，使雙方衝突再次升高。

綜合《路透》、《彭博》、《CNBC》等報導，川普於當地時間13日在真實社群（Truth Social）宣布，美國將恢復對伊朗的海上封鎖；他進一步表示，美方將對所有經由荷姆茲海峽運輸的貨物收取20%費用，以補償美國維護航運安全所需的成本。

美國中央司令部說明，封鎖措施將於當地時間14日下午4時生效，鎖定所有往返伊朗港口及沿海地區的船舶。

荷莫茲海峽航運量腰斬 能源運輸面臨壓力

荷莫茲海峽是全球最重要的能源運輸要道之一，約有全球20%的石油與能源供應須經由此海峽運往世界各地。據MarineTraffic與Kpler統計，在川普宣布封鎖措施之前，其實荷莫茲海峽的船舶通行量已較前一週大減52%。

數據顯示，上週五共有19艘船通過海峽，週六短暫回升至24艘，但週日又降至14艘。Kpler分析指出，美伊緊張局勢再度升高，加上伊朗革命衛隊（IRGC）近期持續發出警告，已使航運公司、船東及保險市場信心明顯轉弱。

能源供應疑慮升高 國際油價單日漲逾9%

此外，川普宣布封鎖消息後，國際油價應聲大漲。美國西德州原油（WTI）期貨收盤勁揚9.4%，收每桶78.14美元；布蘭特原油（Brent）期貨大漲9.6%，收每桶83.30美元，雙雙創下6月15日以來新高。其中，布蘭特原油更寫下自2020年5月以來最大單日漲幅。

GasBuddy能源分析師德漢（Patrick De Haan）預測，若目前情勢持續，美國全國平均汽油價格可能在未來7至10天內升至每加侖4美元，加油站最快24至48小時內就會開始反映油價上漲。

美股收黑、亞股承壓 台股跌破45000點

油價上漲與地緣政治風險同步衝擊全球金融市場。美股四大指數全面收黑，道瓊工業指數下跌138.31點、跌幅0.26%；標普500指數下跌59.92點、跌幅0.79%；那斯達克指數重挫408.43點、跌幅1.55%；費城半導體指數更暴跌619.38點、跌幅4.78%。

亞股今日開盤同步承壓。韓國股市開盤跌破6800點，SK海力士盤中一度跌逾4%，儘管盤中一度在低接買盤帶動下翻紅、重新站回6900點，但隨後賣壓再度出籠，截至台灣時間上午11時22分，韓股下跌4.87%，報6475.35點。

日本日經225指數同樣開低，盤中最低跌至66268.60點，一度下跌約1.45%，之後跌幅逐步收斂，甚至短暫翻紅上漲0.26%。不過，截至台灣時間上午11時22分，指數仍下跌0.84%，報66678.36點。

台股也難逃賣壓衝擊，早盤一度重挫逾千點，失守45000點整數關卡；截至上午11時22分，加權指數下跌1719.10點、跌幅3.79%，市場持續關注中東局勢發展及油價後續走勢。

川普投資大公開！加密貨幣年賺445億元 平均每天80次股市交易引關注

怕成大蕭條罪人！川普親曝妥協原因 美伊談判首輪卻喊卡

news.Title: 台股狂瀉1700點！熱門矽晶圓暴跌 最大隱憂曝光「首選這檔」
news.Content:
台股今（14日）盤中下殺超過1700點，強勢族群矽晶圓暴跌，環球晶與美光簽10年供應長約的大利多無法抗跌。分析師陳威良認為，現在相關族群的乖離率已經過大，如果是在月線附近低接布局比較有機會，且外資與投信站在賣方，跳空漲停可能是隔日沖大戶。

漲價題材 簽長約竟然不是利多？

美光與環球晶簽下長約，昨（13日）相關族群全面噴發，但陳威良對於簽長約持保守看法，「如果是漲價產業看到簽長約，不要太興奮，如果公司預期未來還會一直漲價很久就不會簽長約，如果決定簽長約，等於告訴市場接下來漲價的空間有限。」

另一方面，陳威良於《股動錢潮》節目上表示，環球晶毛利率持續下滑，顯示矽晶圓產業事實上仍是供過於求的狀態，「不是正在漲價，而是預期它們有機會在下半年或明年漲價，如果現在就已經提早跟大客戶簽長約，我會覺得有點保守。」

哪一檔能買？又該怎麼買？

在此情況下，陳威良建議操作上逢低拉回時介入，因為未來還是有比較正面的看法，只是現在乖離已經大，如果是在月線附近卡位，比較有機會賺到波段的利潤，「如果已經在車上就不用太擔心，假設成本在月線，修正之後趨勢是沒有改變的。」

陳威良指出，環球晶如果是在最近1300、1400元才切入的人，在短線上就要靈活一些，開高就要做一些調節。中美晶的股性沒有環球晶活潑，漲的時候會慢一點，但如果真的有拉回，應該也會有比較多的時間讓你落跑。

另外，陳威良也分析合晶的關注重點，「最活潑的是合晶，到目前還是我的首選，因為合晶的長約覆蓋率最低，所以漲價受惠最直接，且盤後籌碼顯示，土洋繼續買超的只有合晶，當然短線仍有追價風險，不需要急著去追。」

news.Title: TSMC seen riding AI boom to fifth straight quarter of record profit
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee and Ben Blanchard TAIPEI, July 14 (Reuters) - TSMC, the world's largest manufacturer of advanced AI chips, will likely notch a fifth consecutive quarter of record earnings, driven ‌by booming AI infrastructure spending. Analysts say demand for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC is expected to report a fifth consecutive quarter of record earnings, driven by robust demand for AI infrastructure and advanced chip technologies.
• The company's net profit for Q2 is projected to surge 59% year-on-year to T$632.6 billion ($19.65 billion), with revenue already showing a record 36% year-on-year increase.
• Analysts anticipate TSMC will raise its full-year revenue growth outlook, currently guided at 'above 30%' year-on-year, due to strong AI demand.
• Investors will also monitor capital expenditure guidance, with potential increases signaling continued confidence in the durability of AI demand.
news.Keywords: AI demand, semiconductor manufacturing, record earnings, revenue growth, capital expenditure

news.Title: 油價飆、升息警報又響！亞股震盪哀鴻遍野　台股盤中狂瀉1500點
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

美國總統川普宣布恢復對伊朗封鎖行動，並對通過荷姆茲海峽的貨物徵收20％費用，導致中東緊張情勢升溫，國際油價創下一個月來新高，亞洲股市週二（14日）早盤也在局勢影響下持續動盪。

台股「黑色星期二」一度狂瀉逾1500點 亞股驚陷劇烈震盪

韓國KOSPI指數持續在平盤附近震盪，其中SK海力士（SK Hynix）股價起伏劇烈，在開盤頭幾分鐘內一度重挫達4.7％，隨後反彈飆升至高達4.6％。日經綜合指數一度下跌近千點後拉至平盤附近；港恆生指數則跌逾1％、上證綜合指數也下滑0.54％，新加坡海峽時報指數也下挫1.01％。

而台股也連帶受到衝擊，上演「黑色星期二」，大盤狂瀉逾1,500點、3.31％，一度來到43,874.13點，失守4萬4大關。

能源衝擊碰上鷹派升息警報 專家示警：風險資產面臨嚴峻挑戰

由於美國CPI（消費者物價指數）數據將於週二晚些時候公布，市場也受到美國聯準會（Fed）理事克里斯多福·沃勒（Christopher Waller）週一鷹派言論的干擾。沃勒表示，如果即將公布的數據顯示通膨持續遠高於2％的目標，美國央行可能需要在「短期內」調升利率。

根據《路透社》（Reuters） 報導 ，總部位於澳洲墨爾本的券商激石集團（Pepperstone）研究部主管魏斯頓（Chris Weston）表示，「雖然過去一週，系統中的風險一直在累積，市場對伊朗衝突的最新消息做出激烈反應。」他認為，「在潛在的能源衝擊情況下，緊縮貨幣政策的前景很少會對風險資產起到支撐作用。」

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

原文出處： 快新聞／油價飆、升息警報又響！亞股震盪哀鴻遍野 台股盤中狂瀉1500點

news.Title: 外資連七賣照樣掃貨！主動ETF狂補台積電、欣興、日月光
news.Content: [Newtalk新聞] 台股13日上演驚天震盪行情，加權指數盤中一度強勢突破46,000點，但隨後賣壓全面湧現，高低震盪超過1,000點，終場僅小漲25點，收在45,703點，4萬6大關得而復失，日K線拉出連二黑。三大法人合計賣超210.66億元，其中外資連續第七個交易日站在賣方，市場避險情緒明顯升溫。 儘管外資持續調節，台積電成為撐盤關鍵。盤後台積電再公布6月營收達4,426億元、年增67.9%，創下歷史新高，進一步強化市場對AI與先進製程需求的信心，也成為當日台股最重要的基本面支撐。 不過今天(14日)大盤約11點前，指數跌逾1200點，跌破45000點，來到44123點！ 國巨爆6 億元違約交割 當沖資金踩踏現形 在劇烈波動下，市場也傳出違約交割事件。證交所昨天傍晚公告，被動元件龍頭國巨爆出約6億元違約交割，引發市場高度關注。由於國巨當日股價震盪劇烈，市場解讀為部分高槓桿或無本當沖資金未能完成交割，成為本波急殺行情的受害者之一。 不過，相較於散戶資金的恐慌踩踏，主動式ETF與大型資金的動作反而顯得相當冷靜。臉書粉專「麻糬爸的主動存股筆記」整理五檔主動式ETF最新籌碼變化，顯示多數經理人選擇趁震盪調整部位，甚至逆勢加碼AI與半導體供應鏈。 00991A加碼台積電 台光電、智邦同步補貨 00991A（主動統一台股增長）當日買進台積電300張，總持股提升至4,200張；同時加碼台光電與智邦各40張，兩檔持股皆來到1,200張整數水位。市場解讀，經理人看好AI伺服器與高速傳輸需求持續擴張，因此在震盪中增加核心持股。 相對地，00991A則賣出信驊38張，持股降至62.5張，顯示高價IP股在短線震盪下仍面臨部分獲利調節壓力。 00992A 高檔減碼創意 買進端完全掛零 00992A（主動群益台灣強棒）則採取更保守策略，當日沒有任何買進動作，僅賣出創意100張，持股降至211張。市場認為，面對法說會前的不確定性與高價股波動加劇，經理人選擇先行降低風險部位。 00981A 持續掃貨載板與封測 核心部位一張不賣 00981A（主動統一台股增長）則展現明顯偏多態度，賣出端掛零，持續加碼欣興554張、日月光投控369張與南電82張。 累計持股方面，欣興達16,333張、日月光投控15,139張、南電9,231張。從配置方向來看，00981A持續聚焦ABF載板與封測產業，顯示經理人看好AI伺服器、高速運算與先進封裝需求。

news.Title: 台股大怒神！盤中暴跌逾1500點　主動式台股ETF全破發
news.Content:
受美伊衝突升溫、荷莫茲海峽封鎖疑慮衝擊市場風險情緒，加上美股費城半導體指數重挫4.78%，台股今（14）日開低走低，盤中一度重挫1506.39點至43,874.13點，不僅跌破44,000點整數關卡，也寫下盤中史上第6大跌點紀錄。

大盤重挫也讓今年甫上市的主動式台股ETF同步承壓。繼主動統一升級50（00403A）日前跌破發行價後，主動富邦台灣龍耀（00405A）、主動中信台灣收益（00406A）及主動凱基台灣（00407A）盤中同步跌破10元發行價，並齊創掛牌以來新低，市場四檔主動式台股ETF全面陷入「破發」窘境。

據時報資訊報導，從盤面來看，電子與金融權值股成為殺盤重心，台積電、聯發科、日月光投控、富邦金等同步走弱，拖累加權指數一度跌破45,000點。不過隨著低接買盤進場，台積電跌幅收斂，加上記憶體族群回神，大盤跌幅亦逐步縮小，力拚站回45,000點關卡。

族群表現方面，受國際油價走高激勵，油電燃氣類股逆勢走強，台塑化盤中大漲逾5%，新海、欣高、山隆同步走揚，類股漲幅居盤面之冠。軍工概念股同樣吸引資金避險布局，千附、亞航攻上漲停，漢翔、雷虎等漲幅也超過5%。

電子族群中則以記憶體表現相對抗跌，南亞科盤中漲逾3%，帶動旺宏、華邦電、鈺創等同步走揚，成為少數逆勢撐盤的電子族群。

分析師表示，目前大盤仍處於高檔震盪整理格局，成交量不足且均線反壓仍在，市場恐慌情緒尚未完全消化，短線仍須留意月線能否收復及後續量能變化，在資金快速輪動下，操作宜維持審慎。

中國信託台灣活力基金經理人徐啟葳指出，近期台股單日動輒千點震盪，除了晶片股波動、美國利率政策不確定性外，也反映上半年快速上漲後的技術性修正，市場已由全面普漲轉向個股分化，投資策略應回歸企業基本面，並避免追逐僅有題材、缺乏獲利支撐的個股。

不過，徐啟葳認為，AI產業長期基本面並未改變，相關商機已從AI伺服器擴大至ASIC設計、先進封裝、PCB、CCL、高速傳輸、散熱、電源管理及光通訊等完整供應鏈，加上全球雲端服務供應商持續擴大資本支出，AI仍是推升企業獲利的重要成長動能。他表示，短線指數震盪恐以盤代跌，建議投資人可採逢回分批布局策略，持續聚焦具基本面支撐的AI主流股。

news.Title: 【台股盤中】電金傳產齊跌　台股盤中挫跌1500點摜破44000點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年7月14日電）台股今天在電子、金融及傳統產業股同步走弱下，指數開低震盪走低，盤中一度下挫1506.39點，摜破44000點關卡，下探至43874.13點。

至10時43分，台股加權指數為44126.24點，下跌1254.28點，成交值新台幣6868億元。

台積電美國存託憑證（ADR）下挫2.89%，台積電 (2330) 今天股價同步走低，早盤回測2400元支撐，下跌40元，市值降至新台幣62.23兆元，影響大盤約317點。

聯發科 (2454) 、台達電 (2308) 、鴻海 (2317) 、日月光投控 (3711) 、國巨 (2327) 、信驊 (5274) 等電子權值、高價股紛紛走弱，電子類股指數一度下跌逾3.5%。

傳產股方面，玻璃類股指數重挫逾7%，機電類股指數下挫逾6%，電纜類股指數也下挫逾3%；塑膠類股指數盤中震盪翻紅，表現相對抗跌。金融類股指數下跌逾2%，表現弱勢。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 《日股早盤》日經挫564點；商社、海運逆漲
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-14 10:38:34 蔡承啟 發佈

因美伊緊張、油價飆漲，美股昨日(13日)走跌，拖累日經225指數14日以低盤開出後，一度下挫近1,000點，早盤收盤(台北時間上午10點30分)跌0.84%或跌564.37點，暫收66,678.36點。

東證股價指數(TOPIX)早盤收盤跌0.12%或跌4.87點，暫收4,002.62點。

截至早盤收盤為止，東證Prime上漲家數1,033家、下跌家數483家、維持平盤家數36家。東證Prime成交額為5兆3,774億日圓。

就類股表現來看，截至早盤收盤為止，全部33類股中、有24類股上漲，其中以服務業類股漲幅最大，其次依序為礦業、海運業和水產農林業。

根據MoneyDJ XQ全球贏家系統的報價顯示，截至日本股市14日早盤收盤(台北時間上午10點30分)為止，日圓相對於美元匯率升值0.07%至162.34日圓兌1美元；日圓相對於美元匯率13日貶值0.46%，3個交易日來首度走貶。

就個股表現來看，NAND Flash廠鎧俠(Kioxia)早盤下挫2.19%、晶片設備巨擘東京威力科創(TEL)早盤大跌3.10%、晶圓切割機廠DISCO早盤重挫2.47%。

日本MLCC廠下挫。龍頭廠村田製作所(Murata)早盤重挫3.03%、太陽誘電(Taiyo Yuden)早盤大跌3.91%、京瓷(Kyocera)早盤跌1.07%。

日本商社股上漲。三菱商事(Mitsubishi)早盤漲0.65%、三井物產(Mitsui)早盤漲1.48%、伊藤忠商事(Itochu)早盤漲0.88%、住友商事(Sumitomo)早盤漲0.23%、丸紅(Marubeni)早盤漲0.25%

日本海運股勁揚。日本郵船(NYK)早盤大漲2.03%、商船三井(MOL)早盤漲1.74%、川崎汽船(K-Line)早盤大漲2.54%。

電爐廠東京製鐵(Tokyo Steel)早盤漲1.85%。 為了觀察市場對之前漲價的反應，東京製鐵維持鋼價不變。

(圖片來源：Shutterstock)

news.Title: Apple stock move vindicates Palantir CEO warning for AI industry
news.Content: The artificial intelligence boom has been nothing but a headache for Apple ( AAPL ) since it started. The stock quickly gained a reputation as an AI laggard. The company recently had to raise prices for some of its products due to the skyrocketing memory prices, caused by the AI buildout. The difficult situation prompted it to start lobbying the Trump administration for clearance to buy memory chips from ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT), which is on the Pentagon's blacklist. Apple is now going straight for the heart of the AI bubble by suing OpenAI. Apple alleges trade secret theft by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple is facing criticism for being an AI laggard and is suing OpenAI, alleging trade secret theft by former employees who now work for OpenAI.
• The lawsuit claims that former Apple employees stole intellectual property to develop OpenAI's consumer hardware and AI models.
• This situation aligns with concerns raised by Palantir CEO Alex Karp regarding the AI industry, specifically issues of value creation, token pricing, and potential IP theft by frontier model makers.
• Apple has also faced increased memory chip prices due to the AI buildout and is seeking clearance to buy chips from a blacklisted Chinese supplier.
news.Keywords: intellectual property, trade secrets, AI industry critique, lawsuit, supply chain costs

news.Title: 單日「強制平倉」破30億！ 韓國股民嘆：借錢攤平慘血本無歸
news.Content:
受中東衝突再起帶來的市場不安情緒影響，韓股持續走弱，半導體產業的「高峰期」爭議與槓桿型單一股票ETF供需失衡，導致市場動盪不安。根據韓國金融投資協會公布的最新資料，僅今年7月因未能按時償還債務，遭到強制平倉的「債務投資」個人資金就超過4000億韓元，市場人士擔憂，在難以判斷股市低點的情況下，這樣的「強制清算」恐將加劇市場下行壓力。

根據韓媒《hankyung》報導，韓國金融投資協會在14日公佈的數據指出，從7月初至10日，證券公司因強制清算而釋出的股票總價值高達4258億韓元（約新台幣91.6億）；尤其在9日，單日強制清算股份價值達1422億韓元（約新台幣30.5億），強制清算和逾期付款的比例也攀升至10.2%，創下自上月9日以來的新高，10日也另有816億韓元股票以低於市價出售。

保證金交易是韓股的一種槓桿投資規則，投資人借款後三個交易日購股，若期限內未補上差額，證券公司則會以低於市價強制出售股票，也就是所謂的「強制平倉」；隨著股市快速走跌，許多債務投資者正面臨強制清算，由於擔保品短缺與清算操作存在時間差，市場預期未來短時間內會有更多遭清算股票流入，進一步衝擊股市。

報導中提到，KOSPI指數於前日單日暴跌近9%，從上月19日高點9385點以來累計下跌27.47%，市場波動劇烈的同時，投資人面臨的「強制清算」也將造成股市額外壓力，未來資產證券研究員表示，「在當前高波動的環境下，即使細微的價格變動，也容易導致高槓桿部位爆倉。」

不過，儘管部分證券公司預期目前市場已接近低點，但短期內缺乏利多事件，難以激勵市場情緒，前日KOSPI的12個月預期本益比（PER）也已降至5%的高位，低於全球金融危機及美伊戰爭初期的水平。

LS證券研究員認為，投資人不必過度恐慌，「雖然短期市場調整後難以期待價格創新高，但市場將隨獲利入袋而產生波動」，他補充，「市盈率已降至極低水平，獲利能力相對高，半導體週期也已觸底，不會再回到過往低點」。

news.Title: SK海力士引爆賣壓！專家示警槓桿折斷一槍斃命 台股2族群當心
news.Content:
台股近來賣壓沉重，今（24）日盤中重挫逾千點，失守45K大關。財信傳媒董事長謝金河發文示警，近期南韓記憶體雙雄SK海力士、三星電子股價同步重挫，已澆熄市場原本的樂觀氣氛，也為全球科技股敲響警鐘。

SK海力士昨（23）日股價暴跌15.39%，三星電子也重挫10.75%，拖累韓股終場大跌669點、跌幅達8.95%，盤中更一度觸發熔斷機制；今（24）日韓股早盤續跌近3%。

謝金河指出，SK海力士才剛完成在美ADR發行，募集265億美元，超額認購超過7倍，顯示市場原本對記憶體產業充滿信心，沒想到股價卻在南韓市場出現崩盤式重挫，並連帶衝擊日韓股市。他也提到，昨日在香港掛牌的兩檔兩倍槓桿ETF同步重傷，XL二南方海力士單日暴跌36.1%，XL二南方三星也跌20.98%，凸顯高槓桿商品在市場反轉時的殺傷力，遠高於一般股票。

謝金河表示，這一個月來他不斷提醒投資人留意兩倍槓桿ETF的風險，如今市場走勢已印證他的擔憂。這波記憶體熱潮也帶動不少三倍槓桿ETF大漲，包括追蹤半導體的SOXL，以及布局南韓市場的KORU，今年盤中一度分別飆漲462.74%、306.75%，如今隨著相關個股回檔，市場也正式進入「算帳時刻」。

謝金河強調，隨著資金熱潮退去，市場將重新聚焦企業獲利，而非題材炒作。至於台股後市，他提醒，今年漲幅驚人、但基本面仍未完全跟上的光通訊與面板族群，接下來恐面臨更大的獲利了結賣壓。

受到市場賣壓影響，面板股今天全面走弱，群創盤中重挫逾8%，友達跌逾6%；光通訊族群同樣承壓，波若威、上詮等個股跌幅均超過4%。

news.Title: 大盤重挫逾千點！記憶體抗跌南亞科維持紅盤 分析師：可從容布局
news.Content:
台股今（14）日受美國恢復對伊朗制裁、國際半導體股重挫衝擊，盤中一度大跌逾千點、失守4萬5千點大關。不過，記憶體族群展現抗跌力道，南亞科（2408）逆勢維持紅盤、華邦電（2344）一度由黑翻平，旺宏（2337）也力守漲勢。分析師指出，韓國記憶體股價重挫主要來自短線獲利了結與槓桿ETF去槓桿效應，並非產業基本面惡化。

SK 海力士13 日 在南韓股市重挫逾 15%，創下近 18 年來最大單日跌幅，拖累全球半導體類股同步走弱，昨晚SK海力士 ADR暴跌逾9%、美光也重挫4.3%、Sandisk跳水12.6%，費半指數重殺近5%。

此外，川普宣布恢復對伊朗封鎖，台股聞訊挫逾千點，指數跌破4萬5大關，但今日台廠記憶體族群表現有撐。截至上午9時50分，南亞科上漲1.7%，報430.5元；華邦電由紅翻黑，早盤一度拉升至平盤震盪；旺宏、承啟（2425）守紅盤。

啟發投顧分析師白易弘指出，近期韓國巨頭三星和SK海力士受到短線獲利了結賣壓，以及去槓桿讓兩倍、三倍槓桿 ETF 的向下跌價螺旋，造成股價重挫。相比之下，台股的南亞科與華邦電表現相對抗跌，即便在今日大盤重挫時仍能展現出韌性。

白易弘表示，記憶體產業的基本面目前並無問題，預計到年報結算前都會維持成長趨勢。從南亞科今年上半年的獲利表現來看，目前的本益比相對較低，且預估下半年的獲利表現仍有發展空間。若以獲利能力推估，股價未來仍有大機率朝向先前的高點500元前進；目前南亞科位階在月線附近，是適合從容布局的時機。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 台股暴殺逾1700點！散戶8字訣自救 4檔投信認養有機會？
news.Content:
國際三大利空強襲，美國出現劇烈震盪，風險蔓延至台股，今（14日）盤中重挫超過1700點，接連失守45000點及44000點大關，台積電能否守住月線，且電子股是否出現低接買盤，成為台股能否止跌甚至反彈的關鍵。

股市劇烈震盪 散戶不要急

摩爾投顧分析師林漢偉於個人Youtube頻道上表示，若從籌碼面來看，外資在現貨持續賣超，期貨空單也小幅增加，整體仍呈現偏空基調，櫃買指數也面臨關鍵的季線保衛戰，建議投資人「先看少做、多看少動」，控制好手上部位的風險，聚焦在有營收與避險族群。

台股又面臨45000點大關的保衛戰，林漢偉點名記憶體、半導體設備及矽晶圓3大族群的表現會是最重要的觀察指標。台積電受到外資賣壓的衝擊，在月線關卡的保衛戰將牽動台股能否回穩或反彈的重點。

熱門 被動元件、記憶體有救？

林漢偉認為光學及金融族群相對強勢，也是資金避風港，留意大立光、先進光、聯一光及保勝光學的表現。熱門族群被動元件則是需要留意日股相關族群的走勢，如果今天能夠回穩，對信昌電、國巨、金山電及禾伸堂等股價反彈有一定帶動作用。

另外，林漢偉建議觀察投信認養的個股是否出現抗跌力道，指標標包括華通、廣達、南亞及臻鼎-KY，最近都是投信開始進行布局的個股。

記憶體族群則要密切留意韓股SK海力士的走勢，如果出現跌深反彈，對南亞科、華邦電、力積電及旺宏等會有一定帶動：矽晶圓方面，林漢偉建議，昨天有隔日沖進場，所以漢磊、台勝科、合晶及環球晶，如果逆勢開高不要過度追價，可以尾盤再考慮進場低接。

news.Title: 聯電攜手SILITH　新加坡廠量產首批矽光子晶圓
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年7月14日電）晶圓代工廠聯電 (2303) 今天宣布，與新加坡商SILITH合作，聯電新加坡廠完成首批量產矽光子晶圓交付，邁入量產新里程碑，推動下世代矽光子大規模製造。

聯電今天發布新聞稿指出，這次與SILITH合作，是結合 SILITH的矽光子設計專業與聯電的12吋晶圓製造與製程能力，支援SILITH每秒1.6太位元（1.6T）解決方案的量產需求，滿足人工智慧（AI）與超大規模資料中心網路對高速AI光互連日益成長的需求。

聯電表示，雙方團隊在18個月內即完成矽光子平台由開發導入量產的目標，展現聯電在矽光子等複雜跨領域技術上的製程整合能力，以及支援客戶規模化量產的實力。

聯電資深副總經理洪圭鈞說，聯電新加坡廠除具備12吋晶圓製造能力，也是聯電重要的技術研發據點。聯電未來將持續強化製造能力，支援客戶不斷成長的需求，加速下世代矽光子應用發展。

聯電表示，SILITH每通道200G矽光子客製化製程成功商業化後，聯電與SILITH正合作開發每通道400G純矽光子平台。

此外，聯電攜手生態系夥伴，開發以鈮酸鋰薄膜（TFLN）為基礎的解決方案，滿足未來超高頻寬光互連需求。結合聯電的先進封裝技術，矽光子與TFLN兩大平台將共同支援共封裝光學（CPO）、光學輸入輸出（I/O）等高度整合架構，協助打造下世代AI基礎建設。

聯電指出，預計2027年提供自有12吋矽光子平台，供更多客戶進行產品開發與量產導入。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 聯電新加坡廠矽光子晶圓量產 攜SILITH搶攻1.6T AI光互連商機
news.Content:
聯電 (2303-TW)(UMC-US) 今 (14) 日與 SILITH 共同宣布，首批矽光子晶圓在聯電新加坡晶圓廠完成量產。本次結合 SILITH 的矽光子設計與聯電的 12 吋晶圓製造能力，以支援 SILITH 每秒 1.6 太位元 (1.6 terabits per second，1.6T) 的解決方案，滿足 AI 與超大規模資料中心網路對高速 AI 光互連的需求。

聯電表示，此次結合 SILITH 專有的矽光子架構，加上自家的製程整合技術、以及其經驗證的絕緣層上覆矽製造能力，雙方團隊在 18 個月內即完成矽光子平台由開發導入量產的目標。該平台已展現達到量產標準的高良率與高可靠度，並已通過全球領先雲端基礎設施客戶的認證，可進行大量布建。

聯電看好，透過此次合作，雙方共同建立一套可擴充的矽光子製造平台，以支援下世代 AI 基礎設施的發展。

SILITH 技術長 Jason Zhang 表示，AI 正以前所未有的速度推升對光學頻寬的需求，使矽光子成為未來資料中心基礎建設的重要關鍵技術。SILITH 致力打造可擴展的矽光子平台，涵蓋可插拔光模組 (pluggable optics)、共封裝光學 (co-packaged optics，CPO) 以及未來的光學 I/O 架構。透過與聯電合作，結合領先的矽光子創新技術與 12 吋大量生產製造能力，提供新世代 AI 網路所需的效能、可擴展性與成本效益。

聯電資深副總經理洪圭鈞表示，很榮幸與 SILITH 這家領先的矽光子公司合作，共同達成此一重要里程碑。SILITH 在服務領先雲端基礎設施與光網路客戶方面已具備實績；此次成果，也充分展現聯電在矽光子等複雜跨領域技術上的製程整合能力，以及支援客戶規模化量產的實力。

洪圭鈞強調，聯電新加坡廠除具備強大的 12 吋晶圓製造能力外，亦是聯電重要的技術研發據點，促使雙方得以快速完成量產導入。展望未來，聯電將持續強化製造能力，以支援客戶不斷成長的需求，加速下世代光子應用的發展。

除了成功推動首項矽光子客戶產品量產之外，聯電預計於 2027 年正式提供自有 12 吋矽光子平台，供更多客戶進行產品開發與量產導入。

延續 SILITH 每通道 200G 矽光子客製化製程成功商業化的成果，聯電與 SILITH 正擴展其矽光子技術藍圖，以支援下一代每通道 400G 光互連。作為關鍵里程碑，雙方正合作開發每通道 400G 純矽光子平台，採用高速馬赫曾德爾調變器 (Mach-Zehnder Modulator，MZM) 設計架構，實現每通道 400G 的高速傳輸能力，同時維持與 CMOS 相容的製程可製造性、量產擴展性與成本優勢。

除每通道 400G 矽光子技術外，聯電亦正攜手生態系夥伴，開發以鈮酸鋰薄膜 (Thin-Film Lithium Niobate，TFLN) 為基礎的解決方案，以滿足未來超高頻寬光互連需求。結合聯電的先進封裝技術，矽光子與 TFLN 兩大平台將共同支援共封裝光學 (CPO)、光學 I/O 等高度整合架構，協助打造下世代 AI 基礎建設。

news.Title: SK海力士由跌轉漲3.8%領軍反攻，KOSPI早盤上下震幅達4%
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】韓股週二早盤上演劇烈逆轉，首爾綜合股價指數早盤一度急挫2.5%，其後在低接買盤湧入、SK海力士強勢翻紅帶動下迅速收復失地，漲幅擴大至1.5%。市場在前一交易日遭遇恐慌拋售後，短線超賣、融資斷頭壓力暫時緩和，吸引資金重新回補大型半導體與權值股。首爾綜合股價指數盤中由跌2.5%轉為上漲1.5%，高低波動幅度達4個百分點。SK海力士(000660.KS)早盤一度急挫3.5%，其後由黑翻紅，最新上漲6.9萬韓元或3.8%，報191.4萬韓元，成為推動大盤逆轉的關鍵個股。

SK海力士前一交易日因第二季獲利預估低於市場共識、HBM4出貨進度疑慮及美國存託憑證(ADR)掛牌後獲利了結，韓股重挫約15.4%創下史上單日最大跌幅，並拖累韓股與全球記憶體類股同步下殺。由於SK海力士ADR相較韓國普通股仍存在顯著溢價，韓股急跌後的價格落差，也吸引部分投資人逢低承接。

不過，盤中急彈尚不足以確認修正已經結束。SK海力士過去一年漲幅龐大，市場仍在消化高估值、記憶體擴產及AI資本支出回報疑慮；加上中東局勢、油價急升及美國通膨數據可能牽動全球利率預期，韓股短線仍可能維持大幅震盪。週二走勢較偏向前一日重挫後的技術性反彈與空頭回補，而非基本面疑慮已全面消除。

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】台股一度重挫逾1500點跌破4萬4大關 分析師李永年：先別急著搶反彈
news.Content:
台股今（14）日開低，盤中一度重挫逾1,506點，截至10點30分最低來到43,874點，指數已跌破4萬4關卡，權王台積電（2330）也同步走弱。對此，資深台股分析師李永年表示，主要受到美股四大指數全面收黑影響，加上台積電及近期強勢族群轉弱，引發市場失望性賣壓，現階段市場信心不足，建議投資人暫時不宜急著進場搶反彈。

今日值班分析師：資深台股分析師李永年

李永年表示，今日台股下跌主要受到美股前一晚表現疲弱影響，拖累市場投資信心，加上台積電今日股價同步走弱，進一步加重指數跌勢。此外，近期盤面領漲的被動元件等電子族群持續探底，也使市場出現失望性賣壓，導致大盤盤中跌點迅速擴大。

他指出，目前加權指數已跌破月線，市場短線呈現恐慌性與失望性賣壓交錯的修正格局，在這種急跌走勢下，不建議投資人急於進場搶短，應先觀察盤勢是否止穩。

李永年進一步表示，市場近期另一項關注焦點，是明日台指期將進行結算，目前外資仍持有約8.1萬口空單，市場擔憂外資可能壓低指數進行空單回補或結算，短線仍須留意期貨市場動向對大盤的影響。

至於成交量方面，李永年認為，目前量能與前一交易日相差不大，並未明顯放大，顯示市場仍偏向觀望，他建議，在不確定因素尚未消除前，建議投資人維持保守操作，等待盤勢止跌訊號再尋找布局時機。

湯暖萱／財經特派記者，主跑主計處、營建、百貨紡織等

news.Title: 台積電衝刺先進封裝，組3DIC聯盟/續攻CoPoS
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-14 09:44:08 數位內容中心 發佈

台積電（2330）近期公布6月合併營收達4426.80億元，較前月增加6.2%，較去年同期增加67.9%，單月營收連兩個月改寫新高。累計今年上半年合併營收為2兆4044.84億元，年增35.6%，延續前段時間的接單與出貨節奏。

單季表現同步墊高。台積電第2季合併營收約1兆2704億元，較第1季增加12%，年增36%，不僅刷新單季紀錄，也已連三季站上兆元水位。這一季營收規模高於先前提出的390億至402億美元區間換算基礎，接下來將銜接第2季財報揭露與最新營運說明。

除了晶圓製造本業，先進封裝相關進度也有新階段。台積電在先進封裝生態系合作中，已與相關廠商共同參與3DIC先進封裝製造聯盟，合作內容聚焦製造技術與供應鏈銜接，範圍涵蓋3DIC與小晶片整合所需的封裝環節，對應公司近年擴大的高階封裝需求。

在更前段的封裝技術開發上，台積電短期重心放在CoPoS，並鎖定310×310mm基板尺寸。今年仍是設備與材料端的驗證期，後續規畫接續試產與量產。相關技術路線也已延伸至Glass Core Substrate方向，現階段仍以製程、材料與大尺寸基板平整度等項目的驗證作業為主。

通寶董事會延攬前台積電、高通大將加入

凌陽創新攻eUSB2/熱成像，後市毛利率維持6成

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 美伊衝突震盪亞股 韓股一度重挫3%、日經殺千點後急拉
news.Content:
美伊衝突持續升溫，亞股週二（14 日）追隨美股走弱，南韓綜合指數 ( KOSPI ) 早盤一度重挫近 3%，失守 6800 點；日經 225 指數 ( NKY ) 也曾大跌逾千點。不過，隨著逢低買盤進場，日韓股市盤中同步急拉，跌幅迅速收斂，盤勢維持劇烈震盪。

美國總統川普（Donald Trump）宣布恢復對伊朗封鎖行動，荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）緊張情勢再度升高，帶動國際油價一度飆升近 10%。此外，SK 海力士 ADR 重挫、領跌半導體族群，拖累科技股全面走弱，費城半導體指數收跌近 5%。

受此衝擊，南韓綜合指數開盤跌破 6800 點，SK 海力士盤中跌逾 3%，三星電子同步走弱逾 1%。不過，在低接買盤進場後，大盤指數一度翻紅並重返 6900 點，上漲 1.57%，記憶體雙雄跌幅也同步收斂。

日經 225 指數同樣開低，盤中最低跌至 66287.24 點、跌幅約 1.4%，隨後跌勢明顯收斂，一度翻紅上漲 0.26%，重新站回 67000 點。

news.Title: 台積電跌30元　台股下挫逾800點失守45000點
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年7月14日電）美國與伊朗展開新一輪軍事衝突，美股主要指數13日全面收跌，與台股關聯性高的費城半導體指數下挫619.38點，台指期夜盤下跌507點，台股今天隨著走低，早盤下跌逾800點，失守45000點關卡，至44500點附近。

台積電6月營收新台幣4426.8億元，第2季營收1.27兆元，皆創下歷史新高，不過，台積電美國存託憑證（ADR）不漲反跌，下跌12.53美元，跌幅2.89%，台積電 (2330) 今天股價同步走跌，早盤滑落至2410元，下跌30元，市值滑落新台幣62.49兆元，影響大盤約238點。

其餘權值和高價股鴻海 (2317) 、日月光投控 (3711) 、國巨 (2327) 、信驊 (5274) 等也紛紛走弱，電子類股指數下跌逾1%。

news.Title: 台股早盤一路下跌陷「4萬5保衛戰」！台積電開2410元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

美國恢復對伊朗封鎖行動，導致荷姆茲海峽緊張情勢升溫，國際油價飆升近10％；同時上週才掛牌的SK海力士ADR領跌半導體族群，也影響科技股，週一（13日）美國股市全面下挫，台指期夜盤也下滑1.11％。台股今（14）日以45,364.40點開出、小跌16.12點，隨後指數一路下探，目前下跌332.62點、來到45,047.90點，陷入4萬5保衛戰。台積電（2330）今以2,410元開出、下跌30元。

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）開236元，跌0.5元；聯發科（2454）以3,830開出，漲5元；廣達（2382）開平盤378元；台達電（2308）以1,900元開出，漲10元；日月光投控（3711）開655元，跌15元；聯電（2303）開150.5元，下跌3元；大立光（3008）開4,480元，漲140元。

金融方面，富邦金（2881）以平盤價127元開出；國泰金（2882）開在97.6元，上漲0.9元；中信金（2891）漲1元，以67.5元開出；兆豐金（2886）開47.2元，漲0.2元；華南金（2880）開在39.25元，上漲0.25元；第一金（2892）以33.85元開出，上漲0.2元；合庫金（5880）以25.3元開出，漲0.1元。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Title: 台股盤中重挫逾1500點！台積電暴跌40元 3大利空引爆拋售潮
news.Content:
10:30更新：亞股台股盤中跌幅擴大，一度下殺超過1500點，接連失守45000點及44000點大關，台積電重挫40元觸及2400元，聯發科慘摔逾6%，台達電挫低逾4%，鴻海及廣達也出現超過2%的跌幅。

09:15更新：台股開盤10分鐘後出現沉重賣壓，一度下殺超過820點，失守45000點大關，台積電挫低30元至2410元，聯發科與台達電暴跌超過2%，鴻海也挫低逾1%，金控股也失守，富邦金跌逾3%，國泰金也下跌逾2%。

3大利空強襲，周一美股劇烈震盪，費城半導體指數下殺4.78%，台積電ADR挫低12.53美元（或2.89%）至421.58美元。台股今（14日）早盤以45364.40點開出，隨後下跌超過250點，權值股台積電暴跌30元觸及2410元，聯發科下跌10元觸及3815元，台達電平盤開出後小漲10元觸及1900元。

摩爾投顧分析師林漢偉預估，台股可能會回測上周低點，面臨45000點大關考驗，關注台積電能否維穩，中小型股則是要留意漲價概念股輪動過快，短線上缺乏盤面主流帶動。

美股面臨3大利空強襲，包括韓國股市賣壓蔓延，導致科技股出現全面性的回檔；地緣政治風險大爆發，布蘭特原油盤中一度大漲超過10%；美國聯準會（Fed）理事沃勒（Christopher Waller）放鷹，如果核心通膨再度上升，將會有提前升息的動作。

美股疲弱也拖累台股表現，林漢偉認為，受到外資賣壓衝擊，台積電的防守表現，尤其是在月線關卡的防衛戰，將是台股能否回穩甚至反彈的重點。台股面臨系統性國際利空，操作上建議投資人「先看少做多看少動」，控制好手上部位的風險，聚焦在有營收與避險族群。

台股昨（13日）開高走低，最終小漲25.91點，收在45380.52點，成交值新台幣1兆257.16億元。三大法人外資及陸資賣超、投信買超、自營商賣超，合計賣超210.66億元。自營商賣超110.98億元，投信買超96.09億元，外資及陸資賣超195.77億元。

news.Title: DRAM成戰略物資，華為佔優勢，智慧手機唯一今年出貨不減反增
news.Content:
【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】南亞科(2408)在上週五法說會繳出超亮眼成績單，第二季毛利率逼近八成、單季大賺超過500億元，並揭露後續ASP、毛利率與營運績效仍舊看漲，以及DRAM缺貨至少將延續數季的訊息，值此同時，中國半導體圈也傳出，華為有意自蓋DRAM廠，對其來說，短、中期有助於確保其安卓手機霸主的地位，並持續拉高市佔率，也在發展AI邊緣運算中取得優勢。受惠於取得大量的DRAM供應，華為今年是智慧型手機中唯一預期銷售不減反增的廠商。南亞科上週五法說會，總經理李培瑛提到，DRAM缺貨是全面的，初期是雲端 HBM、Registered DIMM，因為有缺口使得價格往上再往上，但其後缺貨延伸排擠到其他的領域，導致整體市場都處在缺貨的狀態下。至於近期擔心，終端品牌廠與組裝廠是否因難耐DRAM漲幅過劇會有反制動作，李培瑛回應，這是整個生態的結構，供需與價格連動，可以接受價格較高的終端市場便不受影響，但一些small ticket item(低單價品項)會受到排擠，而且部分市場會因component(零件)成本佔總成本比例太高而做調整。他強調，看起來這些變化，都沒有改變太多供需關係，目前缺口還是很大。此番言論，無疑宣告，DRAM在消費性電子產業中，已經成為戰略物資，也意味著，可以接受持續漲價者，方可取得相對足夠的貨源。

根據市調單位TrendForce（集邦）的數據顯示，受原廠減產舊製程、AI需求擠壓產能影響，消費性DDR4現貨價格與大宗交易價在一年內暴漲了2.5倍至7.4倍，創下史上最大漲幅，而因為DRAM漲幅過劇，已經影響到終端品牌廠與組裝廠的採購意願，加以藉由降低記憶體規格來降低總成本並非品牌廠的明智之舉，已經確定將導致今年智慧型手機與筆記型電腦銷售會衰退。集邦下修2026年全球智慧型手機生產總數預估至10.51億支，年減幅度約達16.2%，而2026年全球筆電出貨量將年減13.6%。

再依照市場調查機構Counterpoint Research與IDC的預測，儘管2026年全球智慧型手機市場面臨記憶體成本飆漲與需求疲弱牽制，整體出貨量預估將創下歷史新低，但華為仍是唯一逆勢成長的中國品牌，主因零組件自製化、本土化策略告捷，尤其取得足夠DRAM產能的挹注，華為今年在中國本土市場，市佔率已突破20%，但反觀小米、OPPO、vivo等中國品牌手機廠，則受限於成本激增，今年內多次被迫調漲售價或調降全年出貨量預估，台灣半導體供應鏈也證實，中國品牌手機廠已經數次下修出貨與展望。

此外，AI的發展，自去年起到明年屬於雲端運算的高峰，CSP業者爭相擴充資本支出投入建置伺服器等雲端基礎建設，而AI雲端所需搭配的DRAM以HBM與DDR5為主，目前供應商僅有美光、SK海力士與三星，但後續雲端建置來到尾聲後，AI邊緣運算將快速崛起，且應用範疇遍地開花，所需要的記憶體，低容量的HBM、DDR5、LPDDR5，甚至DDR4與LPDDR4即可，但客製化比例高，包括南亞科與華邦電均多次對外證實已經投入替客戶開發中，華為跨足DRAM製造，提前卡位與佈局未來的邊緣運算的市場。

news.Title: SK海力士ADR大溢價、恐續跌？美韓股連動漸深
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-14 09:03:57 郭妍希 發佈

SK海力士(SK Hynix)的美國存託憑證(ADR)上週五(7月10日)剛在那斯達克股票交易所(Nasdaq)掛牌、當天飛漲12.76%，但本週一隨即回跌、重挫逾9%，主要是受到荷姆茲海峽再度爆發軍事衝突、引發全球股市劇烈震盪，以及散戶投下大量槓桿部位衝擊。分析人士擔憂，SK海力士ADR溢價幅度大、加上美韓兩國股市連動性愈來愈高，未來美國相關記憶體類股的波動恐將更為劇烈。

MarketWatch 13日報導，俗稱「螞蟻軍團」的南韓散戶先前對SK海力士投下的大量槓桿部位，進一步加劇股價跌勢。SK海力士在南韓掛牌的股票過去12個月狂飆六倍，吸引了龐大投機買盤。

舉例來說，在香港上市、提供兩倍槓桿的南方東英SK海力士每日槓桿(2x)產品(港股代號：7709)，13日股價暴跌了33%。儘管如此，SK海力士ADR (SKHY.US)上週五掛牌後，幾家美國金融機構仍計畫在本週推出類似的槓桿產品。

值得注意的是，SK海力士在南韓掛牌的股票13日終場收在1,845,000韓圜，換算成ADR約為122.70美元，跟7月13日ADR的收盤價(152.35美元)相比，折價幅度逼近20%。然而，由於南韓股票無法直接轉換為美國ADR，投資人無法透過套利交易來抹平這價差，因此這種價格脫鉤的現象預計將會持續下去。

不過，面對如此巨大的折價，部分避險基金可能會採取「放空SK海力士ADR、同時做多南韓普通股」的策略，以期從兩者價差的收斂中獲利。

SK海力士ADR 13日終場重挫9.32%、收152.35美元。

美國其他記憶體與存儲概念股同步走軟。記憶體大廠美光(Micron Technology)、快閃記憶體模組供應商Sandisk Corp.、NAND型快閃記憶體控制晶片設計大廠慧榮科技(Silicon Motion Technology Corp.)、硬碟大廠威騰電子(Western Digital)與希捷(Seagate Technology)分別下挫4.32%、12.63%、8.22%、4.64%、5.46%。

D.A. Davidson董事總經理Gil Luria指出，南韓股市近期波動劇烈，「因為當地散戶交易活躍，且市值前兩大的個股都與記憶體產業高度相關。」三星電子13日慘跌了10.7%。

Luria說，「現在美股市值前幾大的個股中，也有兩家與記憶體相關(指美光與SK海力士ADR)，其中一家還是南韓企業。這代表我們每天早晨都可能『進口』來自南韓市場的波動。」

Coin Bureau創辦人Nic Puckrin也認同Luria的看法。他表示，美國與南韓股市「的連動比以前任何時候都要緊密，彼此都因科技股高度集中而互相引導、推波助瀾。」

Puckrin在電子郵件評論中指出，股市投資人應對這種相互牽動、循環放大的市場效應保持警戒。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: 鉅亨雙週報》美伊風險升溫，弱勢日圓與AI行情牽動資金布局
news.Content: 過去兩週，全球市場同時面臨地緣政治、能源價格、匯率與利率預期的多重變化。美伊緊張情勢使荷姆茲海峽風險升溫，油價短線受到支撐；日圓則在美日利差與日本財政疑慮下持續承壓；美國就業數據雖未顯示景氣快速轉弱，卻也反映勞動市場動能逐步降溫。在「地緣政治風險偏高、景氣仍具韌性但成長力道放緩」的環境下，投資人該如何分辨短期情緒與中長期趨勢？ 1. 中東風險升溫：油價上漲反映風險溢價，並非基本面全面轉強 美國對伊朗採取連續空襲並撤銷伊朗石油銷售豁免後，伊朗以關閉荷姆茲海峽、攻擊商船及盟友作為回應，帶動航運保險費率攀升，油價也因戰爭風險預期而短線走高。不過，OPEC（石油輸出國組織）與 OPEC+ 已在和平階段逐步增產，產量雖尚未完全回到衝突升級前的水準，卻足以讓多家外資機構喊出布蘭特原油有機會回落至每桶 60 至 65 美元。換言之，這波油價上漲更偏向地緣政治產生的「政治保險費」，而非需求面或供給面出現結構性改善。若美伊衝突未進一步升級至全面戰爭，能源市場中長期仍可能回歸供過於求的狀態。 2. 美國經濟：就業動能降溫，通膨與利率預期仍在拉鋸 美國 6 月非農就業新增 5.7 萬人，數據尚未指向衰退，但已明顯低於強勁復甦階段的水準；失業率降至 4.2%，主要原因來自勞動參與率下滑，顯示部分勞動人口選擇退出就業市場。徵才放緩主要集中在休閒旅遊與服務業，科技業裁員也持續進行，使聯準會面對「物價壓力略有緩和、需求逐步降溫」的局面，仍難以快速轉向寬鬆。最新會議紀要仍強調通膨風險尚未消除，並重申通膨終將回到 2% 目標。對股市而言，這代表降息預期仍是支撐行情的重要因素，但降息時程與幅度可能較市場原先期待更為保守。 3. 貨幣市場：日圓跌至 1980 年代以來新低位，去美元化趨勢持續發酵 在日美利差仍大、投資人擔憂日本財政體質的背景下，日圓兌美元跌至 1986 年以來低位，成為近期表現最弱的主要貨幣之一。不過，日本企業信心並未明顯轉弱，企業預期未來 5 年通膨可達 2.6%，也使市場更加關注日本央行是否會因日圓貶值壓力而調整政策立場。 另一方面，根據國際貨幣基金（IMF）統計，各國央行與主權基金正逐步降低美元資產曝險，並增加歐元與人民幣部位。美元主導地位短期內不至於逆轉，但長期去美元化趨勢已逐漸成形。對亞洲股匯市而言，這意味著匯率波動可能比景氣本身更先把投資人甩下車，並成為影響資金流向的重要因素。 4. AI 熱潮延續：科技業裁員與股價行情的「雙軌世界」 雖然美國科技業裁員仍在進行，但調整多集中於傳統軟體與非核心部門；AI、雲端與半導體相關資本支出則持續成長。這也解釋了在全球消費信心仍偏觀望、地緣政治不確定性升高的環境下，美國科技股與台股 AI 供應鏈仍能吸引資金關注的原因：企業可以少開幾家店或延後一般性支出，但在 AI 基礎建設、雲端運算與高階伺服器需求上，仍需不斷投資以確保競爭力。短線市場難免受到油價、利率與風險情緒干擾，但 AI 相關產業鏈的中長期成長邏輯尚未改變；只是隨著評價面升高，股價也需要透過階段性修正消化過度樂觀的期待。 鉅亨投資策略 在亂流中聚焦基本面，並提高資產配置紀律 在美伊衝突與利率不確定性相互交織下，美股與台股短線仍容易受到市場情緒影響。不過，考量美國經濟仍具韌性，AI 資本支出與台灣半導體供應鏈也具備結構優勢，長期仍看好美股與台股表現。日圓雖然持續疲弱，但在日本企業獲利改善、未來日本央行政策可能轉向的背景下，資金回流日股的機會仍值得留意，日股同樣具備中長期投資吸引力。

news.Title: The whole chip trade is waiting on one report
news.Content: Almost every advanced AI chip on the planet is built in one place. Nvidia 's Blackwell processors, Apple's silicon, custom accelerators for Meta and AMD — they all run through the same foundry in Taiwan. That foundry is Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company ( TSM ). TSMC is set to report its second-quarter earnings on Thursday, July 16 , and Wall Street is treating it as a health check for the entire AI boom. The timing is important. Tech stocks have grown volatile as investors question whether AI valuations have run too far, and Thursday's numbers now carry the weight of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC's upcoming earnings report is crucial for the entire AI sector, as it is the sole foundry for most advanced AI chips, including those for Nvidia, Apple, and AMD.
• Analysts expect TSMC to beat estimates for the fifth consecutive quarter, with strong demand for its 3nm and 2nm processes and CoWoS packaging.
• Key metrics to watch include CoWoS packaging capacity growth, capital expenditure guidance (potential upward revision), and the full-year revenue outlook.
• TSMC's decision to increase wafer prices by 5%-10% across multiple nodes indicates strong demand and supports its gross margins above 66%.
news.Keywords: foundry, AI boom, supply chain bottleneck, capital expenditure, pricing power

news.Title: Top Tesla investor warns Saylor is destroying Bitcoin
news.Content: Ross Gerber has run out of patience with Michael Saylor. The Gerber Kawasaki CEO and one of Tesla's most prominent public investors posted on Sunday in response to Saylor's latest Bitcoin content on X , a video captioned "The Right to Bear Arms", with a bluntness that left ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Prominent Tesla investor Ross Gerber has publicly criticized Michael Saylor's strategy regarding Bitcoin holdings, suggesting it is 'destroying Bitcoin'.
• Gerber argues that Saylor's approach, including selling Bitcoin despite public pledges not to, creates negative cycles of liquidation and benefits large players excessively.
• He likens corporate Bitcoin treasury models to financialization that introduces selling pressure and dependency, undermining Bitcoin's decentralized nature.
• The criticism stems from concerns about leveraged corporate treasury vehicles and their impact on Bitcoin's stability and decentralization.
news.Keywords: Bitcoin strategy, investor criticism, corporate treasury, decentralization, market impact

news.Title: Why Chipotle Stock Topped the Market Today
news.Content: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) was generating some heat on the stock market as the trading week opened on Monday. That sizzle came from news of expansion into a prime foreign market, and a bullish ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) shares rose nearly 4%, outperforming the S&P 500, driven by expansion news and a bullish analyst update.
• The company announced its first restaurant opening in Mexico, partnering with franchisee Alsea, with plans for further expansion in the country.
• Mizuho analyst Nick Setyan raised Chipotle's price target to $41 and maintained an 'outperform' rating.
• The expansion into Mexico is seen as a significant development, potentially encouraging bolder foreign expansion if successful.
news.Keywords: international expansion, analyst upgrade, QSR, market outperformance, growth strategy

news.Title: Enbridge Has Secured Over $28 Billion of Growth Capital Projects. Here's Why Dividend Investors Should Care.
news.Content: Enbridge (NYSE: ENB) is one of North America's largest energy infrastructure companies, operating in the midstream part of the ecosystem, which is responsible for transporting and storing oil, natural gas, and other energy products. At the end of the first quarter, Enbridge served over 75% of North American oil refineries, transported 20% ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Enbridge, a major North American energy infrastructure company, has secured over $28 billion in growth capital projects, including pipeline expansion, utility networks, and offshore wind farms.
• This project backlog provides visibility into future revenue streams, which is crucial for investors focused on the company's dividend.
• Enbridge's dividend is paid in Canadian Dollars and is subject to currency fluctuations and withholding tax, but can be recouped via foreign tax credits.
• Despite high debt, Enbridge is considered a reliable income source, having increased its annual dividend for 31 consecutive years.
news.Keywords: energy infrastructure, project backlog, dividend growth, income investing, capital projects

news.Title: 韓日記憶體及被動元件大跌，台股挑戰月線失利
news.Content: 【財訊快報／方亞申】台股受到韓日股市走弱影響，被動元件及二極體、功率半導體族群重挫，探針卡表現也不佳，靠著台積電(2330)、台塑四寶、ABF加上國防軍工股強勢支撐，加權指數終場上漲25.91點或0.06%，收在45,380.52點 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受韓國和日本股市下跌影響，台灣股市中的被動元件、二極體和功率半導體族群出現重挫。
• 儘管面臨壓力，台積電、台塑四寶、ABF及國防軍工股表現強勁，支撐加權指數小幅上漲。
• 市場關注美國企業第二季財報，預期獲利年增約25%，資金可能從漲多的科技七雄轉向其他類股。
• 記憶體大廠三星和海力士的股價表現不如預期，顯示近期漲多的電子股需謹慎，但AI基礎建設支出仍是關鍵。
news.Keywords: 半導體,記憶體,AI,財報,地緣政治

news.Title: Oneok Has Delivered More Than 30 Years of Dividend Stability and Growth. With a 4.7% Yield, Is It the Best Income Stock in the Sector to Buy Right Now?
news.Content: Whenever investors are required to take on even modest amounts of risk, "best" is a subjective word. It means different things to different market participants, and that's true with energy stocks and any other corner of the equity market, for that matter. For some, the best stock is simply the top-performing name. Others assess "best" ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oneok, an energy midstream company, has a 4.7% dividend yield and a 30-year history of uninterrupted dividend payments.
• The company has grown its dividend more than 14-fold over the past 30 years and expects future growth of 3% to 4% annually.
• Oneok has a 12-year streak of growing EBITDA and anticipates free cash flow to exceed $2 billion by 2027.
• The stock is considered undervalued compared to peers, with potential upside if cost-savings and deleveraging objectives are met.
news.Keywords: dividend stability, income stock, energy sector, EBITDA growth, free cash flow

news.Title: Oracle vs. IBM: Which Cloud Computing Stock Is the Better Buy?
news.Content: It wasn't that long ago when Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) looked poised to become a $1 trillion company. However, those plans came to an abrupt halt as the stock shed 40% of its value over the past year. Fellow cloud platform provider IBM (NYSE: IBM) hasn't fared well either, but its flat year-to-date performance looks timid in comparison. Both companies are primed to capitalize on artificial intelligence tailwinds and are already gaining market share. The dip makes Oracle ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle's cloud revenue surged 47% year-over-year in fiscal Q4 2026, with its Cloud Infrastructure segment nearly doubling.
• Oracle has $638 billion in remaining performance obligations, largely due to a five-year, $300 billion deal with OpenAI starting in 2027.
• IBM's cloud revenue grew 13% year-over-year in Q1, contributing to an 11% increase in software sales and 9% overall company revenue growth.
• Oracle trades at a P/E ratio of 25, while IBM trades at 26, with Oracle showing higher revenue and net income growth rates.
news.Keywords: cloud computing, AI tailwinds, revenue growth, remaining performance obligations, valuation

news.Title: Here's Why Oracle Stock Slumped Today
news.Content: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) stock declined more than 6% today as the company was hit with more bad news following last week's credit rating downgrade by S&P Global Ratings to BBB- from BBB. The latest news, Apple ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oracle's stock declined over 6% following a credit rating downgrade by S&P Global Ratings to BBB-.
• Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging theft of trade secrets and seeking to block the use of that information.
• Concerns exist regarding OpenAI's profitability and ability to meet its contractual obligations with Oracle, impacting Oracle's credit default swap pricing.
• S&P Global noted rising business risks for Oracle, particularly if OpenAI cannot fulfill its payment obligations for AI infrastructure.
news.Keywords: credit rating downgrade, lawsuit, trade secrets, AI infrastructure, business risk

news.Title: AI不再獨撐大盤 大摩喊美股「全面開花」 財報季漲勢將再擴大
news.Content:
根據摩根士丹利（Morgan Stanley）策略師最新觀點，隨著美國企業財報季登場，除了科技巨頭之外，美股其他產業也有望繳出強勁業績，進一步擴大股市漲勢。

由麥可 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 摩根士丹利預期，隨著財報季登場，美股除科技巨頭外，其他產業也有望繳出強勁業績，帶動股市全面上漲。
• 標普1500指數成分股的EPS成長率已超過10%，創下疫情後復甦以來最佳表現。

news.Title: SpaceX Just Did Something NuScale Power Investors Should Be Watching
news.Content:
The artificial intelligence industry has an energy problem.

The data center infrastructure that AI technologies rely on to operate is so energy-intensive that the current electricity grid is nowhere near powerful enough to support the ongoing build-out of additional data centers.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) is hoping to solve the problem by placing data centers in space, where they would enjoy significant amounts of free, continuous solar energy and lower cooling costs in the relatively low temperatures of low Earth orbit. SpaceX CEO Elon Musk recently said he wants the company to launch orbital data centers by 2027.

Investor sentiment toward orbital data centers is strong, as evidenced by SpaceX's $1.9 trillion valuation. Wall Street analysts see data centers in space as one of SpaceX's biggest long-term growth opportunities.

But NuScale Power (NYSE: SMR) is trying to meet AI's rising power demand through a very different strategy that could be superior to SpaceX's.

NuScale Power's terrestrial approach

The Department of Energy estimates that the U.S. will see total energy demand grow by as much as 20% over the next decade. Research from the Electric Power Research Institute, meanwhile, projects that data centers could consume up to 9% of U.S. electricity generation by 2030, up from 4% in 2023.

NuScale Power specializes in small modular reactors, or SMRs. "When compared to traditional, large-scale [nuclear power plants], SMRs require less land, shorter construction periods, and have enhanced safety features," concludes a report from Bank of America .

SMRs are also cheaper to build, at least until additional modules are constructed. But it's really shorter construction periods and lower land requirements that make the technology so attractive. That's because AI firms need more energy quickly, and smaller footprints mean SMRs could be co-located directly with data center infrastructure.

Only a handful of SMRs are currently in operation today. But more than 80 are now in some stage of development worldwide. And NuScale Power is the only firm in the U.S. with an approved SMR design -- at least for now.

Musk's intention to launch data centers into space by 2027 to reduce the AI industry's dependence on terrestrial energy strongly demonstrates how important and valuable this initiative is for SpaceX. But NuScale's approach is arguably more feasible and proven, while targeting roughly the same end-market opportunity.

Story Continues

NuScale isn't the only company looking to scale SMRs. Dozens of companies worldwide are attempting to design and sell SMR systems. But NuScale is one of only three pure-play SMR stocks available to investors, alongside Oklo and Nano Nuclear Energy , making it a unique investment opportunity for energy, AI, and SpaceX investors alike.

news.Title: Why Wix Stock Collapsed 56% In The First Half of 2026
news.Content:
Shares of Wix.com (NASDAQ: WIX) have fallen 56% in the first half of 2026, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . The website builder is at a turning point due to advances in artificial intelligence ( AI ) that could disrupt its existing business. Revenue keeps growing, but so far, Wix has not been able to tamp down the narrative that new coding tools will disrupt its drag-and-drop platform.

The stock is now down 85% from its highs, but it continues to post solid growth. Does that make the stock a buy-the-dip candidate right now?

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

Large expenses and an AI narrative

As a website-building platform for small businesses, there is a strong Wall Street theme that new software tools like Claude Code will replace specific software like Wix. Wix has responded to the AI revolution with tools of its own, such as the homegrown acquisition of Base44, an AI application builder, and the internally developed Wix Harmony chatbot website creator.

Revenue has grown over the last few quarters, especially because of Base44's monstrous growth. Revenue was up 14% year-over-year to $541 million in Q1. However, it recently reduced its full-year revenue guidance by $25 million due to a slowdown in its partners' business, which involves third-party designers using Wix's tools to build websites/software for clients. The fear is that Wix is being replaced by AI tools.

Adding to the business's fears is the fact that Wix's expenses grew massively last quarter due to acquisition bonuses for Base44 and two Super Bowl commercial slots. While one could argue that buying Super Bowl commercials is a waste of time, these are one-time expenses that will not be repeated this year and have nothing to do with AI disruption. In fact, due to cost-saving measures, Wix is now expecting full-year adjusted free cash flow of $420 million, $20 million above its previous estimate.

Should you buy the dip?

For anyone looking at Wix stock, management has already been doing its own form of "buying the dip" by repurchasing 30% of its outstanding shares in an April tender offer. This will significantly reduce shares outstanding and increase long-term earnings per share and free cash flow per share.

Wix currently has a market cap of just $2.2 billion and is guiding for $420 million in free cash flow in 2026. Unless you think AI software will kill this business next year, the stock looks mighty cheap after this collapse, and could be worth buying the dip on at current prices.

Story Continues

news.Title: Why SpaceX Stock Sank Today
news.Content:
Is Space Exploration Technologies (NASDAQ: SPCX) stock losing its mojo?

One month after its blockbuster IPO , shares of Elon Musk's space company have come full circle, with the stock closing Monday at $139.14, barely above its "official" IPO price -- and more than $10 below where the stock began trading on IPO day.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

And the latest SpaceX news is looking kind of mixed.

Once more, with feeling

Good news first: The Federal Aviation Administration today closed its review of SpaceX's May Starship test flight and cleared SpaceX to test Starship again later this week. Analysts think Musk will waste no time taking the opportunity, and Starship Test Flight 13 is scheduled to take place this Thursday, July 16, at 6:45 p.m. ET.

If SpaceX succeeds in launching on time, it will mean only 55 days elapsed between Flight 12 and Flight 13 -- four times faster than the delay between Flights 11 and 12. In a note this morning, Raymond James analyst Brian Gesuale cited the increased "operational cadence" as reason for optimism about SpaceX stock, doubling down on his "strong buy" recommendation and predicting SpaceX stock that costs $138 and change today, will hit $800 within a year !

Bad news next

But here's the bad news: Investors aren't buying it. They sold off SpaceX stock today -- and I think China may be part of the reason.

Over the weekend, the China Aerospace Science and Technology Corporation (CASC) launched a reusable Long March 10B rocket from the Wenchang Commercial Space Launch Site on Hainan Island -- then successfully landed it at sea, catching it in a floating frame at sea. The test flight and water landing, called a "complete success," closes the technology gap between SpaceX and China.

It also arguably makes SpaceX a less valuable stock.

news.Title: Intel Investors Who Bought During the Peak of the Dot-Com Bubble Are Finally Out of the Red. It's a Painful Reminder of Why Valuations Matter
news.Content:
Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) is having quite a moment. This year, the tech stock has surged around 180%. And over the past 12 months, its gains are even larger at about 340%. Renewed optimism around the business, some big-name investments, and stronger results in its foundry operations are the key reasons for its success.

But it wasn't all that long ago that this wasn't a great stock to own. While it's done well over the past year, some investors have been waiting years, perhaps even decades, to recoup their losses on the stock. That's because it recently hit levels it hasn't been at since the dot-com crash .

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

The stock is trading at an extremely high value

For investors who bought shares of Intel around March 2000, when the tech stock was near its peak, they would have still been well into negative territory on their investments as recently as a few months ago. While now their investments would finally have become profitable, they would have had to have held on for more than 26 years.

It may be an ominous sign of just how wild the markets have become yet again. Intel, after all, is once again trading at levels it arguably shouldn't be. While the company has been generating some encouraging results of late, the stock trades at a whopping 125 times its estimated future earnings (based on analyst expectations).

While hope these days is around its foundry business, that area of its operations remains unprofitable -- it incurred an operating loss of $2.4 billion during the first three months of the year. Investors may once again be pricing in a lot of future growth and profitability, which, as history has shown, can prove costly.

Intel's stock has been hot, but its performance over 26 years is a cautionary tale about valuation

Hopefully, no investor has been holding on for 26 years waiting for Intel's stock to produce a positive return, but that could have been a reality for anyone buying at the peak. It's only after there's been a drop in value that you can truly know that a peak has been hit, which is why it can be risky to invest in stocks that are rising fast, because it's impossible to know where the top may be.

The one way investors can protect themselves is by always considering valuations and ensuring they aren't buying a stock at obscene multiples, based on assumptions of significant profit or revenue growth that may never be realized. At such a high valuation again, the risk for those buying Intel stock today is that they could end up repeating the mistakes others made during the dot-com bubble.

Story Continues

news.Title: Intel Expands Ireland Chip Plant
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Intel ( INTC , Financials ), the semiconductor company known for computer processors , server chips and chip manufacturing services, plans to invest $5.7 billion in its facility in Leixlip, Ireland.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 4 Warning Signs with INTC.

The expansion will give Intel more capacity to produce Xeon 6 server processors and future generations of the chip. Those products are used in cloud computing, networking, artificial intelligence and other enterprise workloads.

Intel will upgrade existing fabrication facilities and install new manufacturing equipment. It will also expand the automated track system that moves materials between different parts of the campus.

The company said work on the project began earlier this year.

news.Title: Why AI Investors Can Finally Buy the World's Top HBM Maker Directly
news.Content:
For all the money that has poured into artificial intelligence stocks, one of the most important companies in the entire supply chain has been frustratingly hard for ordinary American investors to own.

That changed this week. SK Hynix (NASDAQ: SKHY), the South Korean company that makes more of the specialized memory used in AI systems than anyone else on Earth, began trading on the Nasdaq after a record-setting share sale.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

For the first time, owning a piece of the memory leader is as simple as buying any U.S. stock. So should investors buy in?

What SK Hynix actually does

Before getting to the deal, it helps to understand why this company matters so much. Every AI system needs two things from its chips: raw processing power and fast access to data. The processing gets most of the headlines, but the data side is where SK Hynix lives.

Its specialty is high-bandwidth memory, or HBM -- memory that is stacked and placed right next to the processor so information moves almost instantly. Picture a chef who keeps the most-used ingredients within arm's reach of the stove rather than walking to the pantry each time; HBM is what keeps a power-hungry AI accelerator from sitting idle, waiting on data.

SK Hynix is the clear leader in making it, controlling more than half the HBM market by its own accounting, and it is a critical supplier to Nvidia . Only two rivals compete at the top tier, Samsung Electronics and Micron Technology . That tight, three-company structure gives the leaders real pricing power, which is a big part of why memory has become one of the hottest corners of the chip industry.

Inside the record-breaking IPO

The listing itself was historic. SK Hynix raised $26.5 billion by selling American depositary receipts -- dollar-denominated shares that let U.S. investors own a foreign company through their regular brokerage -- priced at $149 each, with every 10 receipts representing one share traded in Seoul.

Investor appetite was intense, with orders reportedly running to about seven times the shares available, and the stock was indicated to open roughly 17% higher. That haul makes it the largest first-time U.S. listing ever by a foreign company, surpassing Alibaba Group 's 2014 debut and trailing only a small group of the biggest offerings on record, including last month's giant listing from Space Exploration Technologies (SpaceX).

Story Continues

Why direct access is the real story

Here's what I think investors should focus on. Until now, getting SK Hynix exposure meant awkward workarounds: thinly traded over-the-counter receipts, a hard-to-access listing in Korea, or broad Asia and semiconductor funds that diluted the bet.

A proper, liquid Nasdaq listing removes that friction. It also tends to help valuation. For example, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing , which lists in both places, trades at a premium in the U.S., and it may open the door for other Asian chip names, with Kioxia Holdings reportedly considering a similar move. For anyone who wanted a pure play on the AI memory boom rather than a proxy, this is the cleanest option yet.

The risks worth remembering

Easy access is not the same as easy money. Memory is a famously cyclical business that swings between shortage and glut, and the timing here is pointed. Memory stocks actually slid into a bear market just days before the debut, even as Samsung posted one of its best quarters ever. SK Hynix's Korea-listed shares have also climbed several hundred percent over the past year, which leaves little room for error. Competition from Samsung and Micron is fierce, and a future oversupply could pressure prices quickly.

SK Hynix's arrival is a genuine milestone. The world's top HBM maker is now a click away for U.S. investors. That access is valuable, but it works both ways, giving you a direct line to both the upside and the volatility of a boom-and-bust industry. My suggestion is to treat the newfound convenience as a starting point for research, not a reason to rush into a euphoric moment.

news.Title: AMD Seen Posting Strong Quarter
news.Content:

In a new research note, Bank of America said it expects AMD to deliver a "beat and raise" quarter, pointing to exceptional demand for its EPYC server processors. The firm believes AMD is continuing to win market share in the data center market as cloud providers and enterprise customers expand AI infrastructure.

The optimism comes as spending on AI servers remains one of the strongest areas in the semiconductor industry. AMD has steadily strengthened its position against rival Intel by offering higher-performance server chips, while also expanding its portfolio of AI accelerators.

Bank of America believes those trends should support another solid set of quarterly results and an improved outlook for the rest of the year. The firm expects continued momentum from large cloud customers as well as broader enterprise adoption of AI workloads.

The company's upcoming earnings report will provide a closer look at server chip demand, AI revenue growth and whether management sees the current momentum continuing through the second half of the year.

news.Title: Google Takes Aim at Nvidia's AI Chip Market
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Alphabet ( GOOG , Financials ), the technology company behind Google Search , YouTube and Google Cloud, is trying to sell more of its custom AI chips to outside cloud providers, putting it in more direct competition with Nvidia.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 2 Warning Sign with PSKY.

Is GOOGL fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

Google has approached so-called neocloud companies about using its tensor processing units, or TPUs, according to a report from The Information. These specialized cloud providers rent computing power to AI developers and businesses.

The challenge is that Nvidia already has deep relationships with major players such as CoreWeave, Nebius and Lambda. One provider, Nscale, reportedly told Google that its active projects remain centered on GPU capacity.

Still, Google may find openings with smaller firms that are less tied to Nvidia. Its TPUs are already used by customers including Anthropic, Meta and Apple.

Google is also working with Blackstone on a new cloud venture that plans to rent TPU capacity to AI labs and financial firms next year.

For investors, the effort could give Alphabet another way to earn money from technology it once kept mostly in-house. The next test is whether outside cloud providers are willing to build around Google's chips instead of Nvidia's widely used platform.

news.Title: Jensen Huang Slammed a $2.5 Billion Chip-Smuggling Scheme at Nvidia's Stockholder Meeting
news.Content:
Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has solidified its position as one of the most important companies in the tech world, as the undisputed leader in artificial intelligence (AI)-related hardware. The company started as a graphics card maker for video games, but its graphics processing units (GPUs) and other advanced AI chips have since become the hardware foundation for the current AI boom.

Unfortunately, there has been a $2.5 billion chip-smuggling scheme on the black market, and Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't a fan of what's happening. During Nvidia's shareholder meeting, Huang took a strong stance on the scheme, calling it a "dead end."

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

This scheme involves smuggling Nvidia chips into markets like China -- where Nvidia has strict import restrictions and controls -- using methods that circumvent audits intended to verify legitimacy. Despite the issue, there are larger implications that should be encouraging to Nvidia investors.

Going nowhere fast

A major point Huang made is that Nvidia's AI chips aren't like a typical video game graphics card, where you buy it once and it works indefinitely. These chips are part of an ecosystem that requires constant updates (both software and hardware maintenance) that aren't available to chips acquired on the black market.

In other words, they may work now, but without software updates, security patches, and Nvidia's engineering support, their lifespans are short and will inevitably become unusable or a liability to the companies using them. That's the basis for his "dead end" comments.

Nvidia wants to stay in Washington's good graces

As it stands, Nvidia has a monopoly on the advanced GPUs needed to train and deploy AI. Companies like Amazon and Alphabet are beginning to make their own in-house chips, but for the most part, Nvidia comfortably dominates the market. It won't last forever, but other companies have lots of ground to make up before catching up to Nvidia.

Arguably its biggest obstacle right now, though, is government restrictions and compliance requirements. The U.S. has already implemented strict export bans on certain chips to China, so Huang's taking this stance is a way to stay in the good graces of the U.S. government and avoid further crackdowns or potential fines. The fewer geopolitical and regulatory worries, the better.

Story Continues

Nvidia is still rolling strong

The black-market chips haven't had much of a negative effect on Nvidia's business. In its most recent quarter (ended April 26), it made $81.6 billion in revenue (up 85% year over year) and $58.3 billion in net income (up 211% year over year).

Nvidia is a well-oiled machine, and this shows just how wide its technological and competitive moat is. That should be encouraging news for investors seeking sustainable growth and who may have had "AI bubble" worries. There's a reason the company was comfortable authorizing an $80 billion share buyback program and increasing its dividend from $0.01 to $0.25.

news.Title: Google Takes TPUs Deeper Into Neoclouds
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Alphabet ( NASDAQ:GOOGL ) is trying to sell Google's tensor processing units to neocloud providers, pushing deeper into a market dominated by Nvidia's GPUs, according to The Information.

The challenge is distribution. Nvidia ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) already has close ties with major neoclouds including CoreWeave ( NASDAQ:CRWV ), Nebius ( NASDAQ:NBIS ) and Lambda. Nscale, another fast-growing provider, reportedly told Google that its active clusters and customer discussions remain focused on GPU capacity.

Is GOOGL fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

Google designs TPUs specifically for artificial intelligence workloads and uses most of them inside its own data centers. The chips already support customers including Anthropic, Meta Platforms( NASDAQ:META ) and Apple ( NASDAQ:AAPL ), while Google Cloud sells access to them through its infrastructure platform.

Smaller neoclouds may offer a clearer opening. Google is also working with Blackstone on a TPU-based neocloud that is expected to begin renting computing capacity to AI labs, financial firms and high-performance computing customers next year.

news.Title: California's New EV Rebate Makes Tesla the Winner
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

California Governor Gavin Newsom signed legislation Monday California Governor Gavin Newsom signed legislation Monday creating a $3,500 rebate for first-time EV buyers, funded by a $270 million program split between the state budget and automakers. The rebate applies to new vehicles with a suggested retail price of up to $50,000 and includes a separate $1,750 rebate for used EVs priced up to $25,000. The program fills part of the gap left by the federal $7,500 EV tax credit, which Trump eliminated last year.

The $50,000 price cap is a meaningful filter. Tesla's ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) Model 3 and Model Y fall within the threshold, though higher variants and the Cybertruck don't. Rivian's ( NASDAQ:RIVN ) base R2 Standard would also qualify, but deliveries don't begin until the first half of 2027. California is one of the largest EV markets in the U.S., giving the rebate real demand potential. Tesla shares are down 3.27% intraday while Rivian dropped 1.29% .

The rebate won't fully replace the federal credit's scale, but for first-time buyers shopping under $50,000, it's a real incentive.

news.Title: Energy Transfer Could Spend Up to $5.9 Billion on Growth Capex This Year. Here's Why That Matters for Investors.
news.Content:
Energy Transfer (NYSE: ET) is one of the largest midstream energy companies in the United States, with more than 140,000 miles of pipeline for transporting crude oil, natural gas, liquefied natural gas (LNG), natural gas liquids (NGLs), and other refined products.

The company recently upgraded its 2026 growth capital expenditure (capex) guidance to $5.5 billion to $5.9 billion, up from an initial estimate of $5 billion to $5.5 billion, demonstrating its shift to a cycle of growth.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

For income and growth investors, this elevated spending level carries several critical implications.

The build-out is connected to a backlog

This isn't speculative "build-it-and-they-will-come" spending. Management has stated these projects are underpinned by long-term, fee-based volume commitments targeting mid-teens returns. A substantial portion of this capital is flowing toward meeting the massive demand for natural gas-fired electricity generation to support artificial intelligence (AI) data centers.

The company has announced three major gas pipeline projects this year, in addition to three pipeline laterals designed as direct connections to end users, so it already has waiting customers for its projects.

Key drivers for these projects include the gas-to-electricity trend, especially for fueling data centers, and growth in natural gas liquids exports. For example, Energy Transfer's Texas network will supply natural gas to the Nexus Hubbard Campus in central Texas, fueling the on-site generation that powers their new AI hyperscale facility.

Energy Transfer's aggressive capital spending is being driven by a combination of generational shifts in power demand, regional production gluts, and a deliberate decision to pivot away from high-risk megaprojects toward immediately accretive infrastructure.

Its dividend is safe, even with expansion plans

In past cycles, a heavy capex budget might have raised red flags regarding the safety of the partnership's distribution. However, Energy Transfer's financial footing is solid. The company raised its adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) to between $18.2 billion and $18.6 billion, meaning the company has immense cash flow.

In the first quarter, Energy Transfer reported revenue of $27.7 billion, up 32% year over year. Adjusted EBITDA was $4.94 billion, up 20.5% over the first quarter of 2025, and distributable cash flow (DCF) was $2.7 billion, up 16.8% year over year.

Story Continues

The company's DCF easily covers its 6.77% distribution yield, as of its current share price, and provides a heavy multibillion-dollar internal equity cushion to self-fund this growth. Dilutive equity issuance to fund this backlog is off the table.

Energy Transfer said it plans to keep raising distributions by 3% to 5% each year. It's increased its distributions for 18 consecutive quarters.

Investors may need to be patient

While the projects are high-return, infrastructure takes time to build and commission. Because billions of dollars are actively tied up in construction work in progress (CWIP), they are not yet generating EBITDA.

Energy Transfer's shares have risen by more than 19% this year, but that trend may slow. The company's spending plans will likely keep the company's forward valuation multiple compressed in the near term, at just below 13 times forward earnings. The true rerating and subsequent free cash flow inflections are more likely to be a late-2027 and 2028 story once these assets go into service.

Because the company is allocating more capital to organic projects rather than aggressively buying back units or overindexing on distribution hikes, investors should expect management to stick to its conservative 3% to 5% annual distribution growth target. It strikes a clear balance: Reward unit holders today while fully capitalizing on a generational build-out of energy infrastructure.

news.Title: Micron Flags Next AI Chip Bottleneck
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Micron Technology ( NASDAQ:MU ) may be signaling that silicon wafer supply could become the next semiconductor bottleneck as AI-driven memory and logic investment ramps through the end of the decade, according to Wedbush.
