news.Title: Zacks.com featured highlights include Microchip Technology, Semtech, Texas Instruments, Amtech and Vishay Intertechnology
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – July 9, 2026 – Stocks in this week's article are Microchip Technology MCHP, Semtech SMTC, Texas Instruments TXN, Amtech Systems ASYS and Vishay Intertechnology VSH.

5 Top-Ranked Semiconductor Stocks to Buy for Better Returns in July

Semiconductor stocks have been the primary beneficiaries of the AI boom. As the spending on AI infrastructure development and deployment from leading AI companies, hyperscalers, AI fabs and sovereigns is expected to increase manifold, the prospects for semiconductor companies remain hugely positive.

The semiconductor companies offering compute, scale-out networking, storage, scale-up interconnect, custom AI application-specific integrated circuit chips, optical communication and power delivery chips are benefiting from the huge spending opportunity.

A deeper dive into the physical layer of the AI domain reveals that companies providing high bandwidth memory and advanced packaging are likely to gain tremendously as they remain among the most supply-constrained segments amid the massive demand. Companies building retimers, Compute Express Link, Serializer/Deserializer, optical Digital Signal Processors and Transimpedance Amplifiers are also playing a crucial role.

Similarly, networking and optical connectivity chips represent some of the most structurally expanding opportunities, while power delivery semiconductors and signal-conditioning chips remain relatively overlooked. The global semiconductor sales reached a record $120.6 billion in May 2026, which rose 9.2% sequentially and 104.1% year over year, marking the 15th consecutive month. This is an ideal time to hunt for the most potent and silent winner of the semiconductor arena for July.

Investors looking to benefit from semiconductor companies gaining from the AI boom in July 2026 should consider these stocks: Microchip Technology , Semtech , Texas Instruments , Amtech Systems and Vishay Intertechnology . These stocks have a favorable combination of a Growth Score of A or B and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) or 2 (Buy). You can see the complete list of today's Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

Our Picks

Microchip Technology is expanding its presence in AI data center connectivity through PCIe Gen6 switches and retimers, which help move data efficiently among processors, accelerators and other components. The company secured six Gen6 switch design wins ahead of its planned production ramp in the fiscal fourth quarter.

In the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, MCHP's net sales surged 35.1% year over year, while non-GAAP earnings per share (EPS) increased 25.2%. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2027 revenues and EPS suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 32% and 88%, respectively. The consensus mark for fiscal 2027 earnings has been revised upward over the past 30 days.

Story Continues

Currently, Microchip Technology sports a Zacks Rank #1 and has a Growth Score of B.

Microchip Technology Incorporated price-consensus-chart | Microchip Technology Incorporated Quote

Semtech is benefiting from AI-driven data center networking demand, with FiberEdge supporting 800G deployments and CopperEdge expanding its opportunity as 1.6T ramps begin. Data center sales rose 39% year over year in the first quarter of fiscal 2027, while LoRa and high-end consumer products provide additional growth drivers.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for fiscal 2027 revenues and EPS suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 29% and 55%, respectively. The consensus mark for fiscal 2027 earnings has remained unchanged for the past 30 days. Currently, Semtech sports a Zacks Rank #1 and has a Growth Score of B.

Semtech Corporation Price and Consensus

Texas Instruments is benefiting from accelerating AI data center demand for analog and power management chips used in servers, networking equipment and power delivery systems. As AI workloads increase rack power density and energy-efficiency requirements, Texas Instruments' broad power semiconductor portfolio, internal manufacturing scale and 300-millimeter wafer capacity position it to benefit from expanding AI infrastructure investment.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for TXN's 2026 revenues and EPS suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 17% and 41%, respectively. The consensus mark for 2026 earnings has remained unchanged in the past 30 days. Currently, Texas Instruments carries a Zacks Rank #2 and has a Growth Score of B.

Texas Instruments Incorporated price-consensus-chart | Texas Instruments Incorporated Quote

Vishay Intertechnology is benefiting from rising AI infrastructure demand for power management components used in servers and data centers. Its portfolio includes high-voltage MOSFETs, capacitors, power inductors and current-sense resistors for AI power supplies and monitoring systems. Growing deployments of 800G and 1.6T networking platforms are also tailwinds for VSH.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Vishay Intertechnology's 2026 revenues suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 16.7%. The estimate for VSH is pegged at an earnings of 75 cents per share in 2026, indicating an improvement from a loss of 5 cents in 2025. The consensus mark for 2026 earnings has remained unchanged in the past 30 days. Currently, Vishay Intertechnology sports a Zacks Rank #1 and has a Growth Score of B.

Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. price-consensus-chart | Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. Quote

Amtech Systems is benefiting from rising AI infrastructure demand for advanced packaging and AI server board assembly equipment. AI-related sales exceeded 30% of thermal processing solutions revenues in the second quarter. Strong bookings, panel-level packaging demand and next-generation equipment investments position Amtech to benefit as AI chips become larger and packaging requirements intensify.

The Zacks Consensus Estimate for Amtech Systems' fiscal 2026 revenues and EPS suggests a year-over-year increase of approximately 5% and 540%, respectively. The consensus mark for 2026 earnings has remained unchanged in the past 30 days. Currently, Amtech Systems sports a Zacks Rank #1 and has a Growth Score of A.

news.Title: Billionaire Steve Cohen Sold Amazon and Nvidia but Loaded Up on This Beaten-Down Stock
news.Content:
Steve Cohen runs Point72 Asset Management , and investors closely watch his investment decisions through that hedge fund's 13F filings. The most recent 13F highlighted two interesting moves. First, Cohen took profits in artificial intelligence leaders Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA). Second, he dramatically increased his position in Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX).

Here's a look at Steve Cohen's stock buying and selling and why you might want to consider making similar investment moves.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

The AI trade could be changing

Since the start of 2026, neither Amazon nor Nvidia have been a particularly strong performer. Amazon and Nvidia were only up around 5% year to date as of this writing, trailing the roughly 10% gain of the S&P 500 index (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC). That comes after a multi-year advance for each company.

Over the past decade, Amazon was up over 560% compared to a gain of 260% for the S&P 500 index. Nvidia's stock rose more than 16,000% over the same span. Taking profits from strongly performing stocks is hardly shocking, especially as they start to lag the broader market after a long period of strength.

However, what's notable is that the artificial intelligence trade that helped push these two stocks higher appears to be shifting. The early leaders may be giving way to infrastructure companies, such as hydrogen fuel cell maker Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE), that support the build-out of the AI backbone. Between the fourth quarter of 2025 and the first quarter of 2026, Cohen trimmed his stake in Amazon by 6% and his Nvidia position by a whopping 24%.

Cohen is betting on an unloved healthcare giant

While Cohen was selling Nvidia and Amazon shares, he was buying Boston Scientific shares. His position in this medical device maker increased by 50% from the start of the year. What's interesting is that the dollar value of the Boston Scientific position barely budged because the stock has been heading sharply lower. It is down over 50% year to date as of this writing. This is a value play, with Cohen likely betting that the company turns its fortunes around over the long term.

Boston Scientific makes medical devices used in cardiac care (66% of revenues) and medical-surgical products (34%). The products it sells are not optional, so demand is steady regardless of economic trends and market cycles. The company has long been a top player in the medical technology space. However, all companies go through good periods and bad ones. Right now, Boston Scientific isn't hitting on all cylinders.

Story Continues

Notably, the company reported a strong first quarter, but provided a particularly weak outlook for the rest of the year. The numbers here speak volumes. In the first quarter of 2026, Boston Scientific posted organic sales growth of 9.4%, but in the second quarter, it projects organic sales growth could slow to as low as 5%. For the full year, the company lowered its adjusted earnings guidance range from $3.43 to $3.49 per share to a range of $3.34 to $3.41.

There's a reason investors are downbeat right now: the new high end of the guidance range is lower than the old low end. But the company has a long history of success, driven by innovation and strong customer relationships. It is one of a small number of medical device makers that have entrenched industry positions. It is highly likely that the company will eventually emerge from its current funk.

Boston Scientific: A deep value opportunity

The big story for investors right now, however, is Boston Scientific's valuation. For example, its price-to-sales ratio of 3.2x is far below its five-year average of 6x. And its price-to-earnings ratio of 19x is well below its longer-term average of 64x. To be fair, buying a value-oriented stock like Boston Scientific should be viewed as a long-term investment.

Indeed, you can't turn an over $60 billion market cap healthcare giant around on a dime. But it seems highly likely that this industry-leading medical device maker does, eventually, get back on track. Which is likely what Steve Cohen is betting on, and you might want to, too.

news.Title: 【公告】世界 2026年6月合併營收59.77億元 年增33.57%
SK海力士ADR爆逾7倍超額認購！記憶體族群歡呼南亞科亮燈漲停 分析師看法出爐
news.Content:
南韓記憶體大廠SK海力士即將赴美掛牌，規模高達280億美元（約新台幣8991億元）的美國存託憑證（ADR）發行案，不僅有望改寫外國企業赴美IPO規模紀錄，更傳出已獲逾7倍超額認購。激勵台股記憶體族群今（9）日同步走強，南亞科（2408）率先亮燈漲停鎖住435.5元，華邦電（2344）盤中也勁揚逾8%。分析師表示，市場看好SK海力士ADR發行，加上韓股反彈帶動，推升記憶體族群表現，但仍難判定族群是否能一鼓作氣持續上攻。

南亞科盤中一馬當先、亮燈漲停鎖死在435.5元，擺脫先前疲弱走勢。截至上午10時25分，華邦電衝上182元，大漲逾8%；群聯（8299）和廣穎（4973）也漲逾半根停板。另外，晶豪科（3006）、鈺創（5351）、南茂（8150）同步攻上漲停板。

華冠投顧分析師陳韋廷表示，記憶體族群表現強勁，主要受到海力士即將赴美掛牌ADR引發市場搶購的激勵，加上韓國股市在經歷槓桿問題帶來的修正後，今出現約 3% 的反彈，帶動台灣記憶體族群順勢上攻。

陳韋廷指出，南亞科為族群最強勁指標股，技術面上，雖先前受到三星和海力士修正拖累，打到350-400元中線支撐，近期回測也未跌破上周低點，顯示支撐力道穩固。華邦電雖隨之轉強，但先前曾一度跌破支撐後才拉回；群聯等個股，儘管財報表現優異，但目前線型仍相對弱勢。

陳韋廷續指，族群基本面支持力道強勁，第三季漲價已成定局，且預期到 2027 至 2028 年可能都處於供不應求的狀態，但仍須關注市場資金動向，因為即使利多頻傳，股價也可能出現顯著修正。目前美光的線圖表現尚不強，因此難以判定族群是否能一鼓作氣持續上攻，不過他也說，近期回檔是不錯的進場機會。

SK海力士7月10日美國掛牌 爆逾7倍超額認購

南韓記憶體大廠SK海力士將於10日在美國那斯達克掛牌，透過發行美國存託憑證（ADR）募資280億美元（約新台幣8991億元），有望創下外國企業赴美IPO最大規模紀錄。募集資金將用於建設龍仁半導體聚落一期晶圓廠、清州P&T7先進封裝廠，以及採購包括極紫外光（EUV）曝光機在內的先進製造設備。

根據外媒報導，SK海力士此次ADR已獲逾7倍超額認購，吸引多家國際大型機構投資人參與，顯示即使近期全球半導體股震盪，市場對AI高頻寬記憶體（HBM）龍頭的投資熱度依舊不減。公司本周正式啟動ADR發行，計畫發行1779萬股新股；若以募資規模計算，此次交易也可望成為全球歷來第二大股票發行案，僅次於SpaceX日前創下的857億美元IPO紀錄。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 記憶體恢復記憶！ 南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科強勢攻漲停
news.Content:
記憶體集體回神！受惠於AI浪潮引發記憶體缺貨潮、DRAM合約報價續揚，南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科今（9）日強攻漲停，華邦電大漲逾8%，旺宏、群聯漲逾6%，力積電、威剛也有逾3%的漲幅，一掃日前下挫的陰霾。

大摩在近日發布的記憶體產業報告中表示，記憶體產業正逐漸逼近「變化速率頂峰（Peak Rate of Change）」，未來記憶體成長斜率會開始放緩，這也讓記憶體族群在8日表現疲軟。

所幸今日行情迎來大反轉，記憶體模組大廠威剛（3260）公布6月營收，受惠於DRAM及NAND Flash的價格走揚，6月營收來到146.6億，連4月創新高，股價也跳空開高來到417元，上漲3.22%，帶動其他記憶體類股同步上攻，南亞科、鈺創、晶豪科衝漲停，華邦電大漲逾8%，旺宏、群聯漲逾6%。

威剛董事長陳立白表示，記憶體原廠已通知第三季DRAM合約價格將再調升20%至30%，NAND Flash價格也預估上漲35%至40%，顯示市場仍處於供不應求格局，看好AI應用對記憶體的剛性需求持續成長，將持續挹注公司營運。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 國信證券稱北向資金Q2流入A股2193億元人民幣，創紀錄新高
news.Content:
【財訊快報／劉敏夫】外電報導指出，國信證券方面表示，今年第二季北向資金整體流入A股2,193億元人民幣，創下陸股通開通以來季度新高。北向資金增配出海鏈、算力晶片較多，減配消費、紅利較多。吳信坤等國信證券分析師在報告中指出，第二季陸股通占A股自由流通市值比重自第一季的5.1%提升至5.5%。

第二季外資流入寧德時代、中微公司、寒武紀等較多，流出三環集團、貴州茅台、天孚通信等較多。

此外，第二季外資轉為流入港股約494億港幣，是2024年以來首次季度性流入。

外資持股金額約為16兆港幣，占港股整體的比重約為55%，較第一季的56%延續下滑。

港股外資主要流入科技、有色類股等，但在科技類股定價權整體回落明顯。

news.Title: 威盛要買2萬張股藏股！ 日期、價格區間一次看
news.Content:
威盛董事會決議啟動第五次庫藏股買回計畫，預計在48.65至90元區間內斥資最高18億元買回2萬張股票，藉由註銷股本提升每股盈餘，展現維護公司信用與股東權益決心。

決議買回2萬張庫藏股

威盛（2388）8日發布重訊公告表示，為了維護公司信用以及股東權益，經董事會決議將正式實施第五次買回庫藏股計畫。威盛電子預計自民國115年7月9日起至9月8日期間，於集中交易市場買回2,000萬股（即2萬張）普通股，預計買回的股份約占公司已發行股份總數的3.60%。

庫藏股買回區間48.65～90元

根據公告內容表示，本次庫藏股買回的區間價格設定為每股新台幣48.65元至90.00元之間。威盛指出，若未來公司股價低於所定的區間價格下限時，將授權董事長繼續執行買回股份。本次買回計畫預計所需金額上限為新台幣18億元，而依法令規範的公司買回總金額上限則可達新台幣139.05億元。本次買回的庫藏股將依據證券交易法規定，預定於買回日起的六個月內辦理銷除股份之變更登記。透過註銷股本，將有助於提升每股盈餘（EPS）與維護整體股東權益。

（封面圖／翻攝自威盛臉書）

news.Title: 創新高！ 群聯6月營收「年增300%」潘健成：訂單能見度看到2027
news.Content:
NAND儲存大廠群聯電子今（9）日公布2026年6月營收達248.53億元，年增逾300%，刷新歷史單月新高；上半年累計營收首度突破千億大關。執行長潘健成強調，AI基礎建設使NAND儲存需求強勁，某些專案能見度已看到2027年上半年。

群聯6月營收飆新高

群聯（8299 ）公布2026年6月份的營運結果。受惠於市場強勁需求，群聯單月合併營收達到新台幣248.53億元，與上月相比成長9%，較去年同期更大幅增長超過300%，創下該公司歷史上最高的單月營收紀錄。同時，第二季營收678.88億元，季增66％、年增280％，同步創單季新高，累計上半年營收1,088.55億元，年增243％，首度突破千億元大關。

訂單能見度已看到2027

群聯執行長潘健成表示：「隨著AI基礎建設持續擴大，生成式AI正迅速從模型訓練轉向大規模的AI推理，全球對NAND儲存的需求依舊異常強勁。市場供應持續緊張，且沒有明確的緩解跡象。我們看到來自雲端服務提供者（CSP）和AI相關客戶的訂單動能持續穩固，某些專案的能見度甚至已經延伸到2027年上半年。這進一步堅定了我們的信念，即生成式AI數據的爆發式增長將持續驅動儲存的長期需求，而高性能、高可靠性的企業級儲存基礎建設，仍將是AI生態系統的關鍵基石。」

核心產品營收表現驚人

潘健成談到，在今年6月份，群聯的行動裝置控制晶片出貨量年增長達47%，顯示出在全球智慧型手機出貨量整體下滑的背景下，群聯依然展現了市佔率持續擴大的實力。在另一項核心產品線上，群聯的PCIe SSD啟動碟（Boot Drive）產品營收表現驚人，較去年同期飆升了5,600%，這反映出通用伺服器、AI伺服器以及AI網路應用的強烈需求。

改變策略淡出零售市場

潘健成指出，以價格導向為主的零售儲存市場已經不再是群聯的戰略重心。群聯預期，零售相關的營收隨著時間推移，將會逐步下降到總營收的5%以下。在AI基礎建設快速擴張的支撐下，企業級SSD（Enterprise SSDs）與其他高價值的AI儲存解決方案，預計將貢獻越來越高的營收佔比，並成為推動群聯未來成長的核心引擎。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 威盛擬買2萬張庫藏股，維護股東權益
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-07-09 08:48:49 新聞中心 發佈

威盛(2388)昨(8)日公告，董事會決議第五次買回庫藏股，預定期間為7月9日至9月8日，自集中交易市場買回2萬張庫藏股，買回區間價格為每股48.65至90元，公司股價低於區間價格下限，將繼續買回，總金額上限為139.05億元，預定買回股份占公司已發行股份總數比率為3.6%。威盛表示，買回庫藏股主要是在維護公司信用及股東權益。

隨車用運算、邊緣運算與高速傳輸需求持續推進，IC業者加快布局嵌入式與車載平台，威盛在相關產品線維持供應，市場同步關注其在車用電子與高頻傳輸介面布局。

news.Title: 聯電ADR8日上漲1.3122美元漲幅5.60%折台股158.43元
